general.g_text: <b>인터넷 공간에서의 개인 정보 삭제에 관한 법안 제정이 뜨거운 쟁점으로 부각되고 있다. 유럽에서는 이러한 법안이 통과되었고 미국에서도 제한적으로 적용하기로 결정되었다. 우리 사회에서도 그간 피해 사례가 잘 알려져 있기 때문인지 찬성 쪽으로 공감대가 형성되어 있는 듯하다. 그러나 이는 이면에 잠재한 부정적 측면을 고려하지 않은 성급한 동조이다. 이 법안이 실행되었을 때 나타날 수 있는 부작용을 생각해 보라. 삭제된 정보가 흉악범에 관한 것이라면, 특정 기업의 부조리나 공직자의 비리를 고발한 기사라면……. <u>법 시행의 결과가 개인뿐만 아니라 사회, 국가의 불행으로 이어지지 않는다고 누가 자신할 수 있겠는가? </u> 예컨대 누군가가 후속 범죄의 대상이 될 수도 있고 과거의 행적을 조작한 후보자가 선거에서 당선될 수도 있다. 개인의 권리를 존중하려는 의도가 (   )장치가 되어서는 안 될 것이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Việc ban hành dự luật liên quan đến xóa thông tin cá nhân trong không gian internet đang trở thành một vấn đề nóng. Dự luật này đã được thông qua ở châu Âu và được quyết định áp dụng giới hạn ở Mỹ. Trong xã hội của chúng ta, không biết có phải do được biết về nhiều ví dụ bị hại trong thời gian qua hay không mà dường như sự đồng cảm đã dần được hình thành theo hướng tán thành. Tuy nhiên, đây là một sự hưởng ứng khá vội vàng khi không xem xét khía cạnh tiêu cực tiềm ẩn đằng sau. Hãy thử nghĩ về sự phản tác dụng có thể xảy ra khi dự luật này được thi hành. Nếu những thông tin bị xóa liên quan đến tội phạm nguy hiểm, nếu đó là các bài báo tố cáo sự bất hợp lý của một công ty nào đó hay là việc sai trái của những công chức... <u>Ai có thể tự tin rằng kết quả của việc thi hành luật này sẽ không dẫn đến bất hạnh của cá nhân hay của xã hội và quốc gia?</u> Ví dụ, ai đó có thể trở thành đối tượng tiếp theo của tội phạm hoặc ứng cử viên làm giả thành tích trong quá khứ có thể trúng cử trong cuộc bầu cử. Ý muốn tôn trọng quyền cá nhân không nên là một cơ chế ( ).
g_text_translate.en: The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.fr:
La promulgation d'une loi sur la suppression des informations personnelles dans l'espace Internet apparaît comme une question brûlante. En Europe, une telle législation a été adoptée et il a été décidé d'avoir une application limitée aux États-Unis. Il semble y avoir un consensus en faveur des pros, peut-être parce que les cas de dommages sont bien connus dans notre société. Cependant, il s'agit d'un accord hâtif qui ne tient pas compte des aspects négatifs potentiels qui se cachent derrière. Considérez les effets secondaires possibles de la mise en œuvre de cette mesure. Si les informations supprimées concernent un criminel vicieux, s'il s'agit d'un article accusant une certaine entreprise d'absurdité ou de corruption d'agents publics... <u>Qui peut être sûr que les résultats de l'application de la loi ne mèneront pas au malheur ? non seulement pour les individus, mais aussi pour la société et la nation ?</u> Par exemple, quelqu'un pourrait être la cible d'un crime de suivi, ou un candidat qui a manipulé des dossiers antérieurs pourrait être élu. L'intention de respecter les droits individuels ne devrait pas devenir un mécanisme pour causer un préjudice public.


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.es:
La promulgación de una ley sobre la eliminación de información personal en el espacio de Internet está surgiendo como un tema candente. En Europa, se ha aprobado dicha legislación y se ha decidido tener una aplicación limitada en los Estados Unidos. Parece haber consenso a favor de los pros, quizás porque los casos de daños son bien conocidos en nuestra sociedad. Sin embargo, este es un acuerdo apresurado que no considera los posibles aspectos negativos detrás de él. Considere los posibles efectos secundarios de implementar esta medida. Si la información eliminada es sobre un criminal vicioso, si es un artículo que acusa a cierta empresa de absurdo o corrupción de funcionarios públicos... <u>Quién puede estar seguro de que los resultados de la aplicación de la ley no conducirán a la infelicidad no solo para los individuos, sino también para la sociedad y la nación?</u> Por ejemplo, alguien podría ser el objetivo de un delito de seguimiento, o un candidato que manipuló registros pasados ​​podría ser elegido. La intención de respetar los derechos individuales no debe convertirse en un mecanismo para causar daño público.


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.id:
Pemberlakuan undang-undang tentang penghapusan informasi pribadi di ruang Internet muncul sebagai isu hangat. Di Eropa, undang-undang tersebut telah disahkan dan telah diputuskan untuk diterapkan secara terbatas di Amerika Serikat. Tampaknya ada konsensus yang mendukung pro, mungkin karena kasus kerusakan sudah dikenal di masyarakat kita. Namun, ini adalah kesepakatan tergesa-gesa yang tidak mempertimbangkan potensi aspek negatif di baliknya. Pertimbangkan kemungkinan efek samping dari penerapan tindakan ini. Jika informasi yang dihapus adalah tentang penjahat keji, jika itu adalah artikel yang menuduh perusahaan tertentu melakukan absurditas atau korupsi pejabat publik... <u>Siapa yang bisa yakin bahwa hasil penegakan hukum tidak akan mengarah pada ketidakbahagiaan tidak hanya untuk individu, tetapi juga untuk masyarakat dan bangsa?</u> Misalnya, seseorang dapat menjadi target tindak kejahatan, atau kandidat yang memanipulasi catatan masa lalu dapat dipilih. Niat untuk menghormati hak-hak individu seharusnya tidak menjadi mekanisme untuk menyebabkan kerugian publik.

g_text_translate.ja:
インターネット空間における個人情報の削除に関する法律の制定がホットな問題として浮上しています。欧州ではそのような法律が可決され、米国では適用が制限されることが決定されました。被害事例が社会でよく知られているためか、プロに有利なコンセンサスがあるようです。しかし、これは性急な合意であり、その背後にある潜在的なマイナス面を考慮していません。この手段を実装することで起こりうる副作用を考慮してください。削除された情報が悪質な犯罪者に関するものである場合、ある企業の不条理や公務員の腐敗を告発する記事である場合...<u>法執行の結果が不幸につながらないと誰が確信できますか個人だけでなく、社会や国のためにも?</u> たとえば、誰かが追跡犯罪の標的になったり、過去の記録を操作した候補者が当選したりする可能性があります。個人の権利を尊重するという意図が、公害を引き起こす仕組みになってはなりません。

g_text_translate.de:
Die Verabschiedung eines Gesetzes zur Löschung personenbezogener Daten im Internetraum zeichnet sich als heißes Thema ab. In Europa wurde eine solche Gesetzgebung verabschiedet, und es wurde entschieden, dass sie in den Vereinigten Staaten eine begrenzte Anwendung findet. Es scheint Konsens zugunsten der Profis zu geben, vielleicht weil die Schadensfälle in unserer Gesellschaft bekannt sind. Dies ist jedoch eine vorschnelle Vereinbarung, die die potenziellen negativen Aspekte dahinter nicht berücksichtigt. Berücksichtigen Sie die möglichen Nebenwirkungen der Umsetzung dieser Maßnahme. Wenn es sich bei den gelöschten Informationen um einen bösartigen Kriminellen handelt, wenn es sich um einen Artikel handelt, der ein bestimmtes Unternehmen der Absurdität oder der Korruption von Beamten beschuldigt ... <u>Wer kann sicher sein, dass die Ergebnisse der Durchsetzung des Gesetzes nicht zu Unzufriedenheit führen werden nicht nur für Einzelpersonen, sondern auch für die Gesellschaft und die Nation?</u> Zum Beispiel könnte jemand das Ziel eines Folgeverbrechens werden oder ein Kandidat, der frühere Aufzeichnungen manipuliert hat, könnte gewählt werden. Die Absicht, die Rechte des Einzelnen zu respektieren, sollte nicht zu einem Mechanismus werden, um der Öffentlichkeit Schaden zuzufügen.


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
互联网空间个人信息删除法的制定成为热点问题。在欧洲，此类立法已经通过，并已决定在美国有限适用。似乎有一种赞成专业人士的共识，也许是因为损害案件在我们的社会中是众所周知的。然而，这是一个仓促的协议，没有考虑其背后潜在的负面影响。考虑实施此措施可能产生的副作用。如果被删除的信息是关于一个恶毒的罪犯，如果它是一篇指责某公司荒谬或公职人员腐败的文章...... <u>谁能确定执法的结果不会导致不愉快不仅对个人，对社会和国家也是如此？</u>例如，某人可能成为后续犯罪的目标，或者可以选举操纵过去记录的候选人。尊重个人权利的意图不应成为造成公共伤害的机制。

g_text_translate.it:
L'emanazione di una legge sulla cancellazione delle informazioni personali nello spazio Internet sta emergendo come una questione scottante. In Europa, tale legislazione è stata approvata ed è stato deciso di avere un'applicazione limitata negli Stati Uniti. Sembra esserci un consenso a favore dei pro, forse perché i casi di danno sono ben noti nella nostra società. Si tratta però di un accordo frettoloso che non considera i potenziali aspetti negativi che ci sono dietro. Considera i possibili effetti collaterali dell'attuazione di questa misura. Se le informazioni cancellate riguardano un criminale feroce, se si tratta di un articolo che accusa una certa azienda di assurdità o corruzione di pubblici ufficiali... <u>Chi può essere sicuro che i risultati dell'applicazione della legge non porteranno all'infelicità non solo per gli individui, ma anche per la società e la nazione?</u> Ad esempio, qualcuno potrebbe essere l'obiettivo di un crimine successivo o potrebbe essere eletto un candidato che ha manipolato i record del passato. L'intenzione di rispettare i diritti individuali non dovrebbe diventare un meccanismo per causare danni pubblici.


#######

g_text_translate.ru:
Острым вопросом становится принятие закона об удалении личной информации в интернет-пространстве. В Европе такой закон был принят, и решено, что он будет иметь ограниченное применение в Соединенных Штатах. Кажется, существует консенсус в пользу плюсов, возможно, потому, что случаи ущерба хорошо известны в нашем обществе. Однако это поспешное соглашение, не учитывающее стоящие за ним потенциальные негативные аспекты. Рассмотрим возможные побочные эффекты реализации этой меры. Если удаленная информация касается злостного преступника, если это статья, обвиняющая определенную компанию в абсурде или коррупции государственных чиновников... <u>Кто может быть уверен, что результаты применения закона не приведут к несчастьям? не только для отдельных лиц, но также для общества и нации?</u> Например, кто-то может стать объектом последующего преступления или может быть избран кандидат, который манипулировал прошлыми записями. Намерение уважать права личности не должно стать механизмом причинения общественного вреда.


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.th:
การตรากฎหมายว่าด้วยการลบข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลในพื้นที่อินเทอร์เน็ตกำลังกลายเป็นประเด็นร้อน ในยุโรป กฎหมายดังกล่าวผ่านการอนุมัติแล้ว และมีการตัดสินใจว่าจะมีการบังคับใช้อย่างจำกัดในสหรัฐอเมริกา ดูเหมือนว่าจะมีความเห็นพ้องต้องกันกับผู้เชี่ยวชาญ บางทีอาจเป็นเพราะกรณีความเสียหายเป็นที่รู้จักในสังคมของเรา อย่างไรก็ตาม นี่เป็นข้อตกลงเร่งด่วนที่ไม่ได้พิจารณาถึงแง่ลบที่อาจเกิดขึ้นเบื้องหลัง พิจารณาผลข้างเคียงที่เป็นไปได้ของการนำมาตรการนี้ไปใช้ หากข้อมูลที่ถูกลบนั้นเป็นเรื่องเกี่ยวกับอาชญากรที่ชั่วร้ายหากเป็นบทความที่กล่าวหาบริษัทบางแห่งว่าเป็นเรื่องไร้สาระหรือการคอร์รัปชั่นของเจ้าหน้าที่ของรัฐ ... <u>ใครจะมั่นใจได้ว่าผลของการบังคับใช้กฎหมายจะไม่นำไปสู่ความทุกข์ ไม่เพียงแต่สำหรับบุคคลเท่านั้น แต่ยังสำหรับสังคมและประเทศชาติด้วย</u> ตัวอย่างเช่น บางคนอาจเป็นเป้าหมายของอาชญากรรมที่ตามมา หรือผู้สมัครที่บิดเบือนบันทึกในอดีตอาจได้รับเลือก ความตั้งใจที่จะเคารพสิทธิส่วนบุคคลไม่ควรเป็นกลไกในการก่อให้เกิดความเสียหายต่อสาธารณะ


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.pt:
A promulgação de uma lei sobre a eliminação de informações pessoais no espaço da Internet está a emergir como uma questão quente. Na Europa, tal legislação foi aprovada e foi decidido ter aplicação limitada nos Estados Unidos. Parece haver um consenso a favor dos profissionais, talvez porque os casos de danos sejam bem conhecidos na nossa sociedade. No entanto, este é um acordo precipitado que não considera os potenciais aspectos negativos por trás dele. Considere os possíveis efeitos colaterais da implementação desta medida. Se a informação apagada for sobre um criminoso cruel, se for um artigo acusando uma determinada empresa de absurdo ou corrupção de funcionários públicos... <u>Quem pode ter certeza de que os resultados da aplicação da lei não levarão à infelicidade não apenas para os indivíduos, mas também para a sociedade e a nação?</u> Por exemplo, alguém poderia ser alvo de um crime subsequente, ou um candidato que manipulasse registros anteriores poderia ser eleito. A intenção de respeitar os direitos individuais não deve tornar-se um mecanismo para causar danos públicos.


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.hi:
इंटरनेट क्षेत्र में व्यक्तिगत जानकारी को हटाने पर एक कानून का अधिनियमन एक गर्म मुद्दा बनकर उभर रहा है। यूरोप में, ऐसा कानून पारित किया गया है और संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका में इसे सीमित रूप से लागू करने का निर्णय लिया गया है। ऐसा लगता है कि पेशेवरों के पक्ष में आम सहमति है, शायद इसलिए कि नुकसान के मामले हमारे समाज में अच्छी तरह से ज्ञात हैं। हालाँकि, यह जल्दबाजी में किया गया समझौता है जो इसके पीछे के संभावित नकारात्मक पहलुओं पर विचार नहीं करता है। इस उपाय को लागू करने के संभावित दुष्प्रभावों पर विचार करें। यदि हटाई गई जानकारी किसी शातिर अपराधी के बारे में है, यदि यह एक लेख है जिसमें किसी निश्चित कंपनी पर बेतुकेपन या सार्वजनिक अधिकारियों के भ्रष्टाचार का आरोप लगाया गया है...<u>कौन आश्वस्त हो सकता है कि कानून के कार्यान्वयन के परिणाम नाखुशी का कारण नहीं बनेंगे न केवल व्यक्तियों के लिए, बल्कि समाज और राष्ट्र के लिए भी? उदाहरण के लिए, कोई व्यक्ति अनुवर्ती अपराध का लक्ष्य हो सकता है, या कोई उम्मीदवार जिसने पिछले रिकॉर्ड में हेरफेर किया हो, चुना जा सकता है। व्यक्तिगत अधिकारों का सम्मान करने का इरादा सार्वजनिक नुकसान पहुंचाने का तंत्र नहीं बनना चाहिए।


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.
g_text_translate.tr:
İnternet ortamındaki kişisel bilgilerin silinmesine ilişkin yasanın yürürlüğe girmesi sıcak bir konu olarak karşımıza çıkıyor. Avrupa'da bu tür bir mevzuat çıkarıldı ve Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'nde sınırlı uygulama yapılmasına karar verildi. Belki de toplumumuzda hasar vakalarının iyi bilinmesinden dolayı, profesyoneller lehine bir fikir birliği var gibi görünüyor. Ancak bu, arkasında yatan potansiyel olumsuzlukların dikkate alınmadığı aceleci bir anlaşmadır. Bu önlemi uygulamanın olası yan etkilerini düşünün. Silinen bilgi, kötü niyetli bir suçlu hakkındaysa, belirli bir şirketi saçmalıkla veya kamu görevlilerine yolsuzluk yapmakla suçlayan bir makale ise... <u>Yasanın uygulanmasının sonuçlarının mutsuzluğa yol açmayacağından kim emin olabilir? sadece bireyler için değil, toplum ve millet için de mi?</u> Örneğin birisi takip eden bir suçun hedefi olabilir veya geçmiş kayıtları manipüle eden bir aday seçilebilir. Bireysel haklara saygı gösterme niyeti, kamuya zarar verecek bir mekanizma haline gelmemelidir.


#######

The enactment of a law on the deletion of personal information in the Internet space is emerging as a hot issue. In Europe, such legislation has been passed and it has been decided to have limited application in the United States. There seems to be a consensus in favor of the pros, perhaps because the damage cases are well known in our society. However, this is a hasty agreement that does not consider the potential negative aspects behind it. Consider the possible side effects of implementing this measure. If the deleted information is about a vicious criminal, if it is an article accusing a certain company of absurdity or corruption of public officials... <u>Who can be sure that the results of the enforcement of the law will not lead to unhappiness not only for individuals, but also for society and the nation?</u> For example, someone could be the target of a follow-up crime, or a candidate who manipulated past records could be elected. The intention to respect individual rights should not become a mechanism for causing public harm.

general.g_text: <b>성장과 분배는 경제 정책의 양 축이다. 새가 두 날개로 날 듯 둘 중 하나만으로는 국가 경제가 제대로 굴러갈 수 없다. 문제는 어느 쪽에 더 정책의 무게를 두느냐에 있다. 지난 정부에서는 성장률이 올라가면 저절로 분배가 이루어진다는 ‘낙수 효과’를 기대하고 선성장 후분배 정책을 시행했지만 큰 효과를 보지 못하였다. 1950년대와 1960년대에 일부 국가들이 (  ), 이와 함께 소득 불평등이 크게 완화된 예가 있기는 하다. 그러나 대기업이 주도하는 현재 우리의 경제 구조에서는 발전의 성과가 편중되기 마련이어서 낙수 효과를 기대하기가 어렵다. 그러므로 <u>경제 성장에 따른 소득 불평등 완화 현상은 실현되기 어렵다</u>. 따라서 소득 불평등의 심화는 필연적이므로 이에 대한 획기적인 정책이 마련되어야 한다. 이런 점에서 현 정부가 발표한 성장과 분배의 균형에 목표를 둔‘ 소득 주도 성장’정책은 시의 적절하다고 볼 수 있다.

g_text_translate.vi: Tăng trưởng và phân phối là hai trụ cột của chính sách kinh tế. Giống như một con chim bay bằng hai cánh, nền kinh tế quốc dân không thể vận hành đúng cách chỉ với một trong hai cánh. Vấn đề nằm ở chỗ nên đặt nặng chính sách bên nào hơn. Chính phủ nhiệm kỳ trước đã kỳ vọng vào 'Hiệu ứng nhỏ giọt' mà việc phân phối sẽ tự động xảy ra khi tốc độ tăng trưởng tăng lên đồng thời thi hành chính sách phân phối trước tăng trưởng sau nhưng hiệu quả đạt được lại không cao. Trong những năm 1950, 1960, có những ví dụ về việc một số quốc gia (  ), cùng với sự giảm đáng kể về bất bình đẳng thu nhập. Tuy nhiên, trong cơ cấu kinh tế mà các tập đoàn lớn đang chi phối hiện nay của chúng ta, khó có thể kỳ vọng vào hiệu ứng nhỏ giọt vì thành quả phát triển đang được coi trọng hơn rất nhiều. Vì vậy <u>khó có thể hiện thực hóa hiện tượng xoa dịu bất bình đẳng thu nhập do tăng trưởng kinh tế</u>. Do đó, tình trạng bất bình đẳng thu nhập ngày càng trầm trọng là điều không thể tránh khỏi nên cần phải chuẩn bị một chính sách hoạch định mang tính đột phá cho vấn đề này. Về điểm này, chính sách 'Tăng trưởng chủ yếu dựa vào thu nhập' đặt mục tiêu cân bằng giữa tăng trưởng và phân phối do chính phủ hiện hành công bố có thể được coi là phù hợp thời trong thời điểm này.
g_text_translate.en: Growth and distribution are the two pillars of economic policy. Like a bird that flies on two wings, the national economy cannot function properly with only one of its wings. The problem lies in which side's policy should be placed more heavily. The previous government had expected the 'trickle effect' that the distribution would happen automatically when the growth rate increased and at the same time implemented the policy of distribution before growth, but the effect was not achieved. high. There are instances where some countries achieved high economic growth in the 1950s and 1960s, along with a significant reduction in income inequality. However, in our current economic structure dominated by large corporations, it is difficult to expect a trickle-down effect because development achievements are being given much more importance. Therefore, it is difficult to realize the phenomenon of mitigating income inequality due to economic growth</u>. Therefore, the worsening of income inequality is inevitable, so it is necessary to prepare a breakthrough policy planning for this problem. In this regard, the policy of 'Growth on the basis of income' that aims to balance growth and distribution as announced by the current government can be considered appropriate for the moment.
g_text_translate.fr:
La croissance et la distribution sont les deux piliers de la politique économique. Comme un oiseau qui vole sur deux ailes, l'économie nationale ne peut fonctionner correctement avec une seule de ses ailes. Le problème réside dans la politique de quel camp devrait être placée plus lourdement. Le gouvernement précédent s'était attendu à un « effet de ruissellement » selon lequel la distribution se produirait automatiquement lorsque le taux de croissance augmenterait et avait en même temps mis en œuvre la politique de distribution avant la croissance, mais l'effet n'a pas été atteint. haute. Il existe des cas où certains pays ont atteint une forte croissance économique dans les années 1950 et 1960, ainsi qu'une réduction significative des inégalités de revenus. Cependant, dans notre structure économique actuelle dominée par les grandes entreprises, il est difficile de s'attendre à un effet d'entraînement, car les réalisations en matière de développement se voient accorder beaucoup plus d'importance. Par conséquent, il est difficile de se rendre compte du phénomène d'atténuation des inégalités de revenus en raison de la croissance économique</u>. Par conséquent, l'aggravation de l'inégalité des revenus est inévitable, il est donc nécessaire de préparer une planification politique révolutionnaire pour ce problème. A cet égard, la politique de 'Croissance sur la base des revenus' qui vise à équilibrer croissance et répartition telle qu'annoncée par le gouvernement actuel peut être considérée comme appropriée pour le moment.

#######

Growth and distribution are the two pillars of economic policy. Like a bird that flies on two wings, the national economy cannot function properly with only one of its wings. The problem lies in which side's policy should be placed more heavily. The previous government had expected the 'trickle effect' that the distribution would happen automatically when the growth rate increased and at the same time implemented the policy of distribution before growth, but the effect was not achieved. high. There are instances where some countries achieved high economic growth in the 1950s and 1960s, along with a significant reduction in income inequality. However, in our current economic structure dominated by large corporations, it is difficult to expect a trickle-down effect because development achievements are being given much more importance. Therefore, it is difficult to realize the phenomenon of mitigating income inequality due to economic growth</u>. Therefore, the worsening of income inequality is inevitable, so it is necessary to prepare a breakthrough policy planning for this problem. In this regard, the policy of 'Growth on the basis of income' that aims to balance growth and distribution as announced by the current government can be considered appropriate for the moment.

El problema radica en qué parte de la política debe colocarse con más fuerza. El gobierno anterior había esperado el 'efecto goteo' de que la distribución ocurriría automáticamente cuando la tasa de crecimiento aumentara y al mismo tiempo implementó la política de distribución antes del crecimiento, pero el efecto no se logró. alto. Hay casos en los que algunos países lograron un alto crecimiento económico en las décadas de 1950 y 1960, junto con una reducción significativa de la desigualdad de ingresos. Sin embargo, en nuestra estructura económica actual dominada por grandes corporaciones, es difícil esperar un efecto de filtración porque se está dando mucha más importancia a los logros de desarrollo. Por lo tanto, es difícil concretar el fenómeno de mitigar la desigualdad de ingresos debido al crecimiento económico</u>. Por lo tanto, el empeoramiento de la desigualdad de ingresos es inevitable, por lo que es necesario preparar una política de planificación innovadora para este problema. En este sentido, la política de 'Crecimiento sobre la base de la renta' que pretende equilibrar crecimiento y distribución anunciada por el actual gobierno puede considerarse adecuada por el momento.

Pertumbuhan dan distribusi adalah dua pilar kebijakan ekonomi. Bagaikan burung yang terbang dengan dua sayap, perekonomian nasional tidak dapat berjalan dengan baik hanya dengan satu sayapnya. Masalahnya terletak pada kebijakan pihak mana yang harus ditempatkan lebih berat. Pemerintah sebelumnya telah mengharapkan 'trickle effect' bahwa distribusi akan terjadi secara otomatis ketika tingkat pertumbuhan meningkat dan pada saat yang sama menerapkan kebijakan distribusi sebelum pertumbuhan, tetapi efeknya tidak tercapai. tinggi. Ada beberapa contoh di mana beberapa negara mencapai pertumbuhan ekonomi yang tinggi pada 1950-an dan 1960-an, bersamaan dengan penurunan ketimpangan pendapatan yang signifikan. 成長と分配は、経済政策の 2 つの柱です。 2 つの翼で飛ぶ鳥のように、1 つの翼だけでは国家経済は正常に機能しません。問題は、どちらの政策を重くするかだ。前政権は、成長率が上がれば自動的に分配されるという「トリクル効果」を期待し、同時に成長前分配政策を実施したが、その効果は得られなかった。高い。一部の国では、1950 年代と 1960 年代に高度経済成長を達成し、所得格差が大幅に縮小した例があります。しかし、大企業が支配する現在の経済構造では、開発成果がより重視されるため、トリクルダウン効果は期待しにくい。そのため、経済成長による所得格差の是正という現象を実現することは困難です</u>。したがって、所得格差の悪化は避けられず、この問題に対する突破口となる政策立案を準備する必要があります。この点で、現政権が発表した成長と分配の両立を目指す「所得による成長」政策は、当面は妥当と考えられる。

g_text_translate.de:
Wachstum und Verteilung sind die beiden Säulen der Wirtschaftspolitik. Wie ein Vogel, der auf zwei Flügeln fliegt, kann die Volkswirtschaft mit nur einem Flügel nicht richtig funktionieren. Das Problem liegt darin, auf welcher Seite die Politik stärker platziert werden sollte. Die Vorgängerregierung hatte den „Trickle-Effekt“ erwartet, dass die Ausschüttung automatisch bei steigender Wachstumsrate erfolgen würde, und gleichzeitig die Politik der Ausschüttung vor dem Wachstum umgesetzt, aber der Effekt wurde nicht erreicht. hoch. Es gibt Fälle, in denen einige Länder in den 1950er und 1960er Jahren ein hohes Wirtschaftswachstum erzielten, zusammen mit einer erheblichen Verringerung der Einkommensungleichheit. Allerdings ist in unserer heutigen, von Großkonzernen dominierten Wirtschaftsstruktur kaum mit einem Trickle-down-Effekt zu rechnen, da Entwicklungsleistungen viel stärker in den Vordergrund gerückt werden. Daher ist es schwierig, das Phänomen der Verringerung der Einkommensungleichheit aufgrund des Wirtschaftswachstums zu realisieren</u>. Daher ist die Verschlechterung der Einkommensungleichheit unvermeidlich, daher ist es notwendig, eine bahnbrechende politische Planung für dieses Problem vorzubereiten. In dieser Hinsicht kann die von der derzeitigen Regierung angekündigte Politik des „Wachstums auf der Grundlage des Einkommens“, die darauf abzielt, Wachstum und Verteilung auszugleichen, derzeit als angemessen angesehen werden.

增长和分配是经济政策的两大支柱。就像一只用两只翅膀飞翔的鸟一样，国民经济只靠一只翅膀是无法正常运转的。问题在于哪一方的政策应该更重。上届政府曾预料到增长会自动分配的“涓涓效应”，同时实行先分配后增长的政策，但效果并未实现。高的。在某些情况下，一些国家在 1950 年代和 1960 年代实现了高速经济增长，同时收入不平等显着减少。然而，在我们目前以大公司为主导的经济结构中，很难期望产生涓滴效应，因为发展成果被更加重视。因此，经济增长带来的收入不平等现象难以实现</u>。因此，收入不平等的恶化是不可避免的，因此有必要针对这个问题准备突破性的政策规划。在这方面，现政府宣布的旨在平衡增长和分配的“以收入为基础的增长”的政策可以被认为是合适的。

Crescita e distribuzione sono i due pilastri della politica economica. Come un uccello che vola su due ali, l'economia nazionale non può funzionare correttamente con una sola delle sue ali. Il problema sta in quale parte la politica dovrebbe essere posta più pesantemente. Il governo precedente si era aspettato l'"effetto a cascata" che la distribuzione sarebbe avvenuta automaticamente all'aumentare del tasso di crescita e allo stesso tempo ha attuato la politica di distribuzione prima della crescita, ma l'effetto non è stato raggiunto. alto. Tuttavia, nella nostra attuale struttura economica dominata dalle grandi società, è difficile aspettarsi un effetto a cascata perché ai risultati dello sviluppo viene data molta più importanza. Pertanto, è difficile rendersi conto del fenomeno della mitigazione della disparità di reddito dovuta alla crescita economica</u>. Pertanto, il peggioramento della disparità di reddito è inevitabile, quindi è necessario preparare una pianificazione politica rivoluzionaria per questo problema. g_text_translate.ru:
Рост и распределение являются двумя столпами экономической политики. Как птица, летающая на двух крыльях, так и национальная экономика не может нормально функционировать, имея только одно крыло. Проблема заключается в том, политике какой стороны следует уделять больше внимания. Предыдущее правительство ожидало «эффекта капельного орошения», когда распределение произойдет автоматически, когда темпы роста увеличится, и в то же время реализовало политику распределения до роста, но эффект не был достигнут. высокий. Есть примеры, когда некоторые страны достигли высокого экономического роста в 1950-х и 1960-х годах, наряду со значительным сокращением неравенства доходов. Однако в нашей нынешней экономической структуре, в которой доминируют крупные корпорации, трудно ожидать эффекта просачивания вниз, поскольку достижениям в области развития придается гораздо большее значение. Поэтому трудно реализовать феномен смягчения неравенства доходов за счет экономического роста</u>. Таким образом, ухудшение неравенства доходов неизбежно, поэтому необходимо подготовить прорывное политическое планирование для решения этой проблемы. В этой связи политику «Роста на основе доходов», направленную на балансирование роста и распределения, заявленную нынешним правительством, можно считать целесообразной на данный момент.

#######

g_text_translate.pt:
O crescimento e a distribuição são os dois pilares da política económica. Tal como um pássaro que voa com duas asas, a economia nacional não pode funcionar adequadamente com apenas uma das asas. O problema reside em que lado a política deveria ser colocada com maior peso. O governo anterior esperava o 'efeito de gotejamento' de que a distribuição aconteceria automaticamente quando a taxa de crescimento aumentasse e ao mesmo tempo implementou a política de distribuição antes do crescimento, mas o efeito não foi alcançado. alto. Há casos em que alguns países alcançaram um elevado crescimento económico nas décadas de 1950 e 1960, juntamente com uma redução significativa na desigualdade de rendimentos. No entanto, na nossa actual estrutura económica dominada por grandes empresas, é difícil esperar um efeito de propagação porque as conquistas do desenvolvimento estão a receber muito mais importância. Portanto, é difícil perceber o fenómeno de mitigação da desigualdade de rendimentos devido ao crescimento económico</u>. Portanto, o agravamento da desigualdade de rendimentos é inevitável, pelo que é necessário preparar um planeamento político inovador para este problema. Neste sentido, a política de “Crescimento com base no rendimento”, que visa equilibrar o crescimento e a distribuição, tal como anunciada pelo actual governo, pode ser considerada apropriada para o momento.

#######

In this regard, the policy of 'Growth on the basis of income' that aims to balance growth and distribution as announced by the current government can be considered appropriate for the moment.
g_text_translate.hi:
विकास और वितरण आर्थिक नीति के दो स्तंभ हैं। दो पंखों पर उड़ने वाले पक्षी की तरह, राष्ट्रीय अर्थव्यवस्था केवल एक पंख के साथ ठीक से काम नहीं कर सकती है। समस्या यह है कि किस पक्ष की नीति को अधिक महत्व दिया जाए। पिछली सरकार ने 'ट्रिकल इफेक्ट' की अपेक्षा की थी कि विकास दर बढ़ने पर वितरण अपने आप हो जाएगा और साथ ही विकास से पहले वितरण की नीति लागू की थी, लेकिन प्रभाव हासिल नहीं हुआ। उच्च। ऐसे उदाहरण हैं जहां कुछ देशों ने 1950 और 1960 के दशक में उच्च आर्थिक विकास हासिल किया, साथ ही आय असमानता में उल्लेखनीय कमी आई। हालाँकि, बड़े निगमों के प्रभुत्व वाली हमारी वर्तमान आर्थिक संरचना में, कम प्रभाव की उम्मीद करना मुश्किल है क्योंकि विकास उपलब्धियों को बहुत अधिक महत्व दिया जा रहा है। इसलिए, आर्थिक विकास के कारण आय असमानता को कम करने की घटना को महसूस करना मुश्किल है</u>। इसलिए, आय असमानता का बिगड़ना अपरिहार्य है, इसलिए इस समस्या के लिए एक सफल नीति योजना तैयार करना आवश्यक है। इस संबंध में, वर्तमान सरकार द्वारा घोषित 'आय के आधार पर विकास' की नीति जिसका उद्देश्य विकास और वितरण को संतुलित करना है, को फिलहाल उपयुक्त माना जा सकता है।

g_text_translate.tr:
Büyüme ve dağıtım ekonomi politikasının iki temel direğidir. İki kanadıyla uçan bir kuş gibi, ülke ekonomisi de tek kanadıyla düzgün işleyemez. Sorun hangi tarafın politikasının daha ağır basması gerektiğiyle ilgili. Önceki hükümet, büyüme oranı arttığında dağıtımın otomatik olarak gerçekleşeceği 'damlama etkisi'ni beklemiş ve aynı zamanda büyümeden önce dağıtım politikasını uygulamıştı ancak etki elde edilememişti. yüksek. Bazı ülkelerin 1950'li ve 1960'lı yıllarda yüksek ekonomik büyüme elde ettiği ve gelir eşitsizliğinde önemli bir azalma sağladığı örnekler vardır. Ancak büyük şirketlerin hakim olduğu mevcut ekonomik yapımızda, kalkınma başarılarına çok daha fazla önem verildiği için aşağı yönlü bir etki beklemek zor. Bu nedenle ekonomik büyüme nedeniyle gelir eşitsizliğinin azalması olgusunu gerçekleştirmek zordur</u>. Dolayısıyla gelir eşitsizliğinin daha da kötüleşmesi kaçınılmaz olduğundan bu soruna yönelik atılımcı bir politika planlamasının hazırlanması gerekmektedir. Bu bakımdan mevcut hükümetin açıkladığı büyüme ve dağılım dengesini hedefleyen 'Gelir esasına göre büyüme' politikası şu an için uygun görülebilir.

#######

However, in our current economic structure dominated by large corporations, it is difficult to expect a trickle-down effect because development achievements are being given much more importance. Therefore, it is difficult to realize the phenomenon of mitigating income inequality due to economic growth</u>. Therefore, the worsening of income inequality is inevitable, so it is necessary to prepare a breakthrough policy planning for this problem. In this regard, the policy of 'Growth on the basis of income' that aims to balance growth and distribution as announced by the current government can be considered appropriate for the moment.

4. Прогнозирование снижения экономического роста из-за изменений в политике.
--------------------
주장하다: Утверждать, утверждать.

#######

Choose the answer that suits the author's attitude as indicated in the underlined part.

3. Arguing that distribution according to growth as before is impossible.
4. Predicting that economic growth will decrease due to policy changes.
--------------------
주장하다: To claim, to affirm.

general.g_text: <b>인류의 지난 문명은 동질성이 지배해 왔다. 동질성 위주의 사고방식은 씨족사회 시절부터 오늘에 이르기까지 공동체의 힘을 결집시켜 주었고 그것은 곧 인류 발전의 원동력이 되었다. 그러나 지금도 곳곳에서 발생하고 있는 무력 충돌이라는 부작용을 초래하기도 한다. 동질성이 강조될수록 (    ) 커지기 때문이다. 교통 통신의 발달로 변방과 국경이 사라진 지구촌의 인류에게 필요한 덕목은 더 이상 동질성이 아니다. <u>그것은 자칫 다름을 철저히 배격함으로써 지구촌 차원의 불행을 야기할 수도 있다</u>. 이 시대 인류 전체의 화두는 ‘다름’이 되어야 한다. 다른 것은 또 다른 것을 보완하고 완성시키며 성장케 하는 조력자이다. 또한 서로 다른 것의 결합은 기존의 것과 구별되는 창조의 원천이다. 도래하는 신문명 시대의 가치는 동질성이 아닌 다름에서 찾아야 한다. 이제 새로운 사고의 틀로 인류의 역사를 새롭게 쓸 때이다.

g_text_translate.vi: Các nền văn minh trong quá khứ của nhân loại được thống trị bởi tính đồng nhất. Lối tư duy lấy tính đồng nhất làm trọng tâm giúp thống nhất sức mạnh của cộng đồng từ thời xã hội thị tộc cho đến ngày nay, và nó đã trở thành động lực cho sự phát triển của nhân loại. Tuy nhiên, điều này cũng dẫn đến hệ quả không mong muốn là xung đột vũ trang vẫn đang xảy ra ở nhiều nơi. Lý do là tính đồng nhất càng được nhấn mạnh thì (   ) càng lớn. Đạo đức cần thiết đối với con người trên mái nhà trái đất, nơi vùng biên giới và biên ải đã biến mất do sự phát triển của giao thông vận tải và thông tin liên lạc đã không còn đồng nhất. <u>Điều này có thể gây ra bất hạnh trên cấp độ toàn cầu do sự bài xích triệt để sự khác biệt</u>. Chủ đề của toàn bộ câu chuyện về nhân loại trong thời đại này phải là 'Sự khác biệt'. Sự khác nhau là trợ thủ giúp bổ sung, hoàn thiện và phát triển những cái khác. Ngoài ra, sự kết hợp của những cái khác là nguồn gốc sáng tạo để phân biệt với những thứ hiện có. Giá trị của thời đại văn minh sắp tới phải được tìm thấy ở sự khác biệt chứ không phải tính thống nhất. Bây giờ là lúc viết mới lại lịch sử nhân loại theo khuôn khổ tư duy mới.
g_text_translate.en: The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. However, this also leads to the undesirable consequence that armed conflicts are still occurring in many places. This is because the more homogeneity is emphasized, the greater the hostility to difference. Morality is necessary for people on the roof of the earth, where borders and borders have disappeared due to the development of transportation and communication, which is no longer uniform. <u>This can cause unhappiness on a global level due to the radical rejection of difference</u>. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. Now is the time to rewrite human history in a new frame of mind.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les civilisations passées de l'humanité étaient dominées par l'homogénéité. La pensée centrée sur l'unité aide à unifier la force de la communauté depuis l'époque de la société clanique jusqu'à nos jours, et elle est devenue la force motrice du développement de l'humanité. Cependant, cela conduit également à la conséquence indésirable que des conflits armés continuent de se produire dans de nombreux endroits. En effet, plus l'homogénéité est soulignée, plus l'hostilité à la différence est grande. La moralité est nécessaire pour les gens sur le toit de la terre, où les frontières et les frontières ont disparu en raison du développement des transports et de la communication, qui n'est plus uniforme. <u>Cela peut causer du malheur au niveau mondial en raison du rejet radical de la différence</u>. Le thème de toute l'histoire de l'humanité à cette époque devrait être « la Différence ». La différence est que les assistants complètent, perfectionnent et développent les autres. De plus, la combinaison des autres est source de créativité pour se distinguer de celles existantes. La valeur de l'ère de civilisation à venir doit être trouvée dans la diversité, pas dans l'unité. Il est maintenant temps de réécrire l'histoire humaine dans un nouvel état d'esprit.

#######

The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. However, this also leads to the undesirable consequence that armed conflicts are still occurring in many places. This is because the more homogeneity is emphasized, the greater the hostility to difference. Morality is necessary for people on the roof of the earth, where borders and borders have disappeared due to the development of transportation and communication, which is no longer uniform. <u>This can cause unhappiness on a global level due to the radical rejection of difference</u>. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. Now is the time to rewrite human history in a new frame of mind.
g_text_translate.es:
Las civilizaciones pasadas de la humanidad estuvieron dominadas por la homogeneidad. El pensamiento centrado en la unidad ayuda a unificar la fuerza de la comunidad desde la época de la sociedad del clan hasta el día de hoy, y se ha convertido en la fuerza impulsora del desarrollo de la humanidad. Sin embargo, esto también tiene la consecuencia indeseable de que todavía se producen conflictos armados en muchos lugares. Esto se debe a que cuanto más se enfatiza la homogeneidad, mayor es la hostilidad hacia la diferencia. La moral es necesaria para las personas en el techo de la tierra, donde las fronteras y fronteras han desaparecido debido al desarrollo del transporte y la comunicación, que ya no es uniforme. <u>Esto puede causar infelicidad a nivel global por el rechazo radical a la diferencia</u>. El tema de toda la historia de la humanidad en esta era debería ser 'Diferencia'. La diferencia es que los asistentes complementan, perfeccionan y desarrollan a los demás. Además, la combinación de otros es fuente de creatividad para distinguirlo de los existentes. El valor de la era venidera de la civilización debe encontrarse en la diversidad, no en la unidad. Ahora es el momento de reescribir la historia humana en un nuevo estado de ánimo.

#######

g_text_translate.id:
Peradaban masa lalu umat manusia didominasi oleh homogenitas. Pemikiran yang berpusat pada kesatuan membantu menyatukan kekuatan komunitas dari masa masyarakat klan hingga saat ini, dan telah menjadi kekuatan pendorong bagi perkembangan umat manusia. Namun, hal ini juga menimbulkan akibat yang tidak diinginkan yaitu konflik bersenjata masih terjadi di banyak tempat. Hal ini karena semakin homogenitas ditekankan, semakin besar permusuhan terhadap perbedaan. Moralitas diperlukan bagi orang-orang di atap bumi, di mana batas-batas dan perbatasan telah hilang karena perkembangan transportasi dan komunikasi yang tidak lagi seragam. <u>Hal ini dapat menyebabkan ketidakbahagiaan di tingkat global karena penolakan radikal terhadap perbedaan</u>. Tema keseluruhan cerita kemanusiaan di era ini seharusnya 'Perbedaan'. Bedanya, asisten melengkapi, menyempurnakan, dan mengembangkan orang lain. Selain itu, kombinasi dari yang lain merupakan sumber kreativitas untuk membedakannya dari yang sudah ada. Nilai peradaban yang akan datang harus ditemukan dalam keragaman, bukan dalam persatuan. Sekaranglah waktunya untuk menulis ulang sejarah manusia dalam kerangka berpikir yang baru.

#######

The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. g_text_translate.ja:
人類の過去の文明は、同質性によって支配されていました。団結の思想は、氏族社会の時代から現代に至るまで共同体の力を結集させ、人類発展の原動力となってきました。しかし、これは武力紛争が依然として多くの場所で発生しているという望ましくない結果にもつながります。これは、同質性が強調されるほど、違いに対する敵意が大きくなるからです。交通や通信の発達により国境や国境がなくなり、画一的ではなくなった地球の屋根に住む人々には道徳が必要です。 <u>違いを根本的に拒絶することで、世界レベルで不幸を引き起こす可能性があります</u>。この時代の人類全体のテーマは「違い」であるべきです。違いは、アシスタントが他の人を補完し、完成させ、発展させることです。また、既存のものとは一線を画す創造力の源泉は、他者との組み合わせです。来るべき文明の価値は、団結ではなく、多様性に見出されなければなりません。今こそ、人類の歴史を新しい考え方で書き直す時です。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Die vergangenen Zivilisationen der Menschheit waren von Homogenität geprägt. Das einheitszentrierte Denken trägt dazu bei, die Kraft der Gemeinschaft von der Zeit der Clan-Gesellschaft bis heute zu vereinen, und ist zur treibenden Kraft für die Entwicklung der Menschheit geworden. Dies führt jedoch auch zu der unerwünschten Folge, dass es vielerorts immer noch zu bewaffneten Konflikten kommt. Denn je mehr Homogenität betont wird, desto größer ist die Differenzenfeindlichkeit. Moral ist notwendig für die Menschen auf dem Dach der Erde, wo Grenzen und Grenzen durch die nicht mehr einheitliche Entwicklung von Transport und Kommunikation verschwunden sind. <u>Dies kann aufgrund der radikalen Ablehnung von Unterschieden auf globaler Ebene zu Unzufriedenheit führen</u>. Das Thema der ganzen Geschichte der Menschheit in dieser Ära sollte „Unterschied“ sein. Der Unterschied besteht darin, dass Assistenten andere ergänzen, perfektionieren und weiterentwickeln. Darüber hinaus ist die Kombination anderer die Quelle der Kreativität, um sie von bestehenden zu unterscheiden. Der Wert des kommenden Zivilisationszeitalters muss in der Vielfalt liegen, nicht in der Einheit. Jetzt ist es an der Zeit, die Menschheitsgeschichte in einer neuen Geisteshaltung neu zu schreiben.

#######

The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. Now is the time to rewrite human history in a new frame of mind.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
人类过去的文明以同质为主。以团结为中心的思想有助于统一从宗族社会时代至今的社区力量，成为人类发展的动力。然而，这也导致了许多地方仍在发生武装冲突的不良后果。这是因为越强调同质性，对差异的敌意就越大。地球屋脊上的人需要道德，因为交通和通讯的发展，边界和边界已经消失，不再是统一的。 <u>由于激进地拒绝差异，这可能会导致全球范围内的不愉快</u>。这个时代人类整个故事的主题应该是“差异”。不同之处在于助手补充、完善和发展他人。此外，其他的组合是创造性的源泉，以区别于现有的。即将到来的文明时代的价值必须在多样性中，而不是在统一中。现在是用新的思维方式改写人类历史的时候了。

#######

Le passate civiltà dell'umanità erano dominate dall'omogeneità. Il pensiero centrato sull'unità aiuta a unificare la forza della comunità dal tempo della società dei clan fino ai giorni nostri, ed è diventato la forza trainante per lo sviluppo dell'umanità. Tuttavia, ciò porta anche alla conseguenza indesiderabile che i conflitti armati sono ancora in corso in molti luoghi. Questo perché più si enfatizza l'omogeneità, maggiore è l'ostilità alla differenza. La moralità è necessaria per le persone sul tetto della terra, dove i confini e le frontiere sono scomparsi a causa dello sviluppo dei trasporti e delle comunicazioni, che non sono più uniformi. <u>Ciò può causare infelicità a livello globale a causa del rifiuto radicale della differenza</u>. Il tema dell'intera storia dell'umanità in quest'epoca dovrebbe essere la "differenza". La differenza è che gli assistenti completano, perfezionano e sviluppano gli altri. Inoltre, la combinazione di altri è la fonte della creatività per distinguerla da quelle esistenti. Il valore della prossima età della civiltà deve essere trovato nella diversità, non nell'unità. Ora è il momento di riscrivere la storia umana in un nuovo stato d'animo.

#######

The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. However, this also leads to the undesirable consequence that armed conflicts are still occurring in many places. This is because the more homogeneity is emphasized, the greater the hostility to difference. Morality is necessary for people on the roof of the earth, where borders and borders have disappeared due to the development of transportation and communication, which is no longer uniform. <u>This can cause unhappiness on a global level due to the radical rejection of difference</u>. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. Now is the time to rewrite human history in a new frame of mind.
g_text_translate.ru:
В прошлых цивилизациях человечества доминировала однородность. Единоцентрированное мышление помогает объединить силы сообщества со времен родового общества до наших дней и стало движущей силой развития человечества. Однако это также приводит к нежелательным последствиям: во многих местах все еще происходят вооруженные конфликты. Это происходит потому, что чем больше подчеркивается однородность, тем больше враждебность к различиям. Нравственность необходима людям на крыше земли, где границы и границы исчезли из-за развития транспорта и связи, уже не однородного. <u>Это может вызвать недовольство на глобальном уровне из-за радикального неприятия различий</u>. Темой всей истории человечества в эту эпоху должно быть «Различие». Разница в том, что помощники дополняют, совершенствуют и развивают других. Кроме того, сочетание других является источником творчества, позволяющим отличить его от существующих. Ценность грядущей эпохи цивилизации должна заключаться в разнообразии, а не в единстве. Сейчас настало время переписать человеческую историю в новом образе мышления.

#######

The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. However, this also leads to the undesirable consequence that armed conflicts are still occurring in many places. This is because the more homogeneity is emphasized, the greater the hostility to difference. Morality is necessary for people on the roof of the earth, where borders and borders have disappeared due to the development of transportation and communication, which is no longer uniform. <u>This can cause unhappiness on a global level due to the radical rejection of difference</u>. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. Now is the time to rewrite human history in a new frame of mind.

อารยธรรมในอดีตของมนุษยชาติถูกครอบงำด้วยความเป็นเนื้อเดียวกัน การคิดแบบสามัคคีเป็นศูนย์กลางช่วยประสานความเข้มแข็งของชุมชนตั้งแต่สมัยสังคมตระกูลจนถึงปัจจุบันและกลายเป็นพลังขับเคลื่อนการพัฒนามนุษยชาติ อย่างไรก็ตาม สิ่งนี้ยังนำไปสู่ผลลัพธ์อันไม่พึงประสงค์ที่ความขัดแย้งด้วยอาวุธยังคงเกิดขึ้นในหลายแห่ง เนื่องจากยิ่งเน้นความเป็นเนื้อเดียวกันมากเท่าใด ความเกลียดชังต่อความแตกต่างก็จะยิ่งมากขึ้นเท่านั้น คุณธรรมเป็นสิ่งจำเป็นสำหรับผู้คนบนหลังคาโลกที่ซึ่งพรมแดนและพรมแดนได้หายไปเนื่องจากการพัฒนาด้านการขนส่งและการสื่อสารที่ไม่เหมือนกันอีกต่อไป <u>สิ่งนี้อาจทำให้เกิดความไม่มีความสุขในระดับโลกเนื่องจากการปฏิเสธความแตกต่างอย่างรุนแรง</u> ธีมของเรื่องราวทั้งหมดของมนุษยชาติในยุคนี้ควรเป็น 'ความแตกต่าง' ความแตกต่างก็คือผู้ช่วยจะเติมเต็ม สมบูรณ์แบบ และพัฒนาผู้อื่น นอกจากนี้การรวมกันของสิ่งอื่น ๆ ยังเป็นที่มาของความคิดสร้างสรรค์เพื่อแยกแยะความแตกต่างจากสิ่งที่มีอยู่ คุณค่าของยุคอารยธรรมที่กำลังจะมาถึงต้องพบจากความหลากหลาย ไม่ใช่ความสามัคคี ตอนนี้เป็นเวลาที่จะเขียนประวัติศาสตร์ของมนุษย์ใหม่ในกรอบความคิดใหม่

g_text_translate.pt:
As civilizações passadas da humanidade foram dominadas pela homogeneidade. O pensamento centrado na unidade ajuda a unificar a força da comunidade desde a época da sociedade de clãs até os dias atuais e tornou-se a força motriz para o desenvolvimento da humanidade. No entanto, isto também leva à consequência indesejável de que os conflitos armados ainda ocorrem em muitos lugares. Isto porque quanto mais a homogeneidade é enfatizada, maior é a hostilidade à diferença. A moralidade é necessária para as pessoas no telhado da terra, onde fronteiras e fronteiras desapareceram devido ao desenvolvimento dos transportes e das comunicações, que já não são uniformes. <u>Isso pode causar infelicidade em nível global devido à rejeição radical da diferença</u>. O tema de toda a história da humanidade nesta época deveria ser “Diferença”. A diferença é que os assistentes complementam, aperfeiçoam e desenvolvem os outros. Além disso, a combinação de outros é fonte de criatividade para distingui-lo dos já existentes. O valor da próxima era da civilização deve ser encontrado na diversidade e não na unidade. Agora é a hora de reescrever a história humana com um novo estado de espírito.

g_text_translate.hi:
मानव जाति की पिछली सभ्यताओं में एकरूपता का बोलबाला था। एकता-केंद्रित सोच कबीले समाज के समय से लेकर आज तक समुदाय की ताकत को एकजुट करने में मदद करती है और यह मानव जाति के विकास के लिए प्रेरक शक्ति बन गई है। हालाँकि, इसका अवांछनीय परिणाम यह भी होता है कि कई स्थानों पर अभी भी सशस्त्र संघर्ष हो रहे हैं। ऐसा इसलिए है क्योंकि जितना अधिक एकरूपता पर जोर दिया जाता है, भिन्नता के प्रति शत्रुता उतनी ही अधिक होती है। पृथ्वी की सतह पर लोगों के लिए नैतिकता आवश्यक है, जहाँ परिवहन और संचार के विकास के कारण सीमाएँ और सीमाएँ गायब हो गई हैं, जो अब एक समान नहीं हैं। <u>अंतर की मौलिक अस्वीकृति के कारण यह वैश्विक स्तर पर नाखुशी का कारण बन सकता है</u>। इस युग में मानवता की पूरी कहानी का विषय 'अंतर' होना चाहिए। अंतर यह है कि सहायक दूसरों के पूरक, परिपूर्ण और विकसित होते हैं। इसके अलावा, दूसरों का संयोजन रचनात्मकता का स्रोत है जो इसे मौजूदा लोगों से अलग करता है। सभ्यता के आने वाले युग का मूल्य एकता में नहीं, विविधता में पाया जाना चाहिए। अब समय आ गया है कि मानव इतिहास को एक नये दृष्टिकोण से फिर से लिखा जाए।

#######

The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. However, this also leads to the undesirable consequence that armed conflicts are still occurring in many places. This is because the more homogeneity is emphasized, the greater the hostility to difference. Morality is necessary for people on the roof of the earth, where borders and borders have disappeared due to the development of transportation and communication, which is no longer uniform. <u>This can cause unhappiness on a global level due to the radical rejection of difference</u>. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. Now is the time to rewrite human history in a new frame of mind.
g_text_translate.tr:
İnsanlığın geçmiş uygarlıklarında homojenlik hakim olmuştur. Birlik merkezli düşünce, klan toplumundan günümüze kadar topluluğun gücünü birleştirmeye yardımcı olmuş ve insanlığın gelişiminin itici gücü haline gelmiştir. Ancak bu aynı zamanda birçok yerde silahlı çatışmaların devam etmesi gibi istenmeyen bir sonuca da yol açmaktadır. Çünkü homojenlik ne kadar vurgulanırsa farklılık düşmanlığı da o kadar artıyor. Artık tekdüze olmayan ulaşım ve iletişimin gelişmesiyle sınırların ve sınırların ortadan kalktığı yeryüzünün çatısındaki insanlar için ahlak gereklidir. <u>Bu, farklılığın radikal bir şekilde reddedilmesi nedeniyle küresel düzeyde mutsuzluğa neden olabilir</u>. Bu çağda insanlığın bütün hikâyesinin teması 'Farklılık' olmalıdır. Aradaki fark, asistanların başkalarını tamamlaması, mükemmelleştirmesi ve geliştirmesidir. Ayrıca başkalarının birleşimi onu mevcut olanlardan ayıracak yaratıcılığın kaynağıdır. Gelecek medeniyet çağının değeri birlik içinde değil çeşitlilikte bulunmalıdır. Şimdi insanlık tarihini yeni bir bakış açısıyla yeniden yazmanın zamanıdır.

#######

The past civilizations of mankind were dominated by homogeneity. The unity-centered thinking helps to unify the strength of the community from the time of the clan society to the present day, and it has become the driving force for the development of mankind. However, this also leads to the undesirable consequence that armed conflicts are still occurring in many places. This is because the more homogeneity is emphasized, the greater the hostility to difference. Morality is necessary for people on the roof of the earth, where borders and borders have disappeared due to the development of transportation and communication, which is no longer uniform. <u>This can cause unhappiness on a global level due to the radical rejection of difference</u>. The theme of the whole story of humanity in this era should be 'Difference'. The difference is that assistants complement, perfect and develop others. In addition, the combination of others is the source of creativity to distinguish it from existing ones. The value of the coming age of civilization must be found in diversity, not in unity. general.g_text: <b>현대 사회는 다양한 이익 집단의 관계가 복잡하게 얽혀 있기 때문에 많은 사회적 갈등이 존재한다. 사회 문화적 요소가 포함된 갈등에서부터 경제적 요인이 포함된 갈등, 일상생활과 관련된 갈등까지 사회적 갈등들은 여러 요인에 의해 끊임없이 발생한다. <u>그런데 이러한 사회적 갈등이 타협을 통해 합리적으로 조정된다면 사회를 통합하는 동력으로 작용할 수 있을 것이다.</u> 따라서 사회적 갈등을 합리적으로 해결하기 위해 사회 구성원 모두가 합의할 수 있는 해결 원칙을 세울 필요가 있다. 먼저 (    ) 해결하는 것이 중요하다. 즉 당사자 간의 자유로운 대화와 협상을 통해 쟁점을 해결하려는 노력이 우선되어야 한다. 다음으로 갈등의 당사자 모두에게 이익이 되는 방향으로 해결해야 한다. 갈등 해결에 따른 이익이 한쪽에만 돌아가면 쟁점을 둘러싼 갈등이 계속 이어지기 때문이다. 또한 국민 전체의 이익과 부합되는 방향으로 해결되어야 그 해결 방안이 국민의 지지를 받을 수 있다는 점도 잊지 말아야 한다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trong xã hội hiện đại, quan hệ của các nhóm lợi ích được đan chéo phức tạp nên tồn tại nhiều mâu thuẫn xã hội. Nhiều mâu thuẫn xã hội không ngừng xảy ra vì nhiều nguyên nhân, từ mâu thuẫn bao hàm yếu tố văn hóa xã hội đến mâu thuẫn có nguyên nhân kinh tế. <u>Tuy nhiên nếu những mâu thuẫn này được điều chỉnh một cách hợp lý nhờ thỏa hiệp thì nó có thể được dùng làm động lực hợp nhất xã hội.</u> Vì vậy, để giải quyết mâu thuẫn xã hội một cách hợp lý, các thành viên xã hội cần xây dựng nguyên tắc giải quyết mà tất cả đều đồng ý. Đầu tiên, giải quyết (  ) là điều quan trọng. Tức là phải ưu tiên nỗ lực giải quyết điểm vấn đề tranh cãi thông qua đối thoại tự do và đàm phán giữa các bên. Sau đó phải giải quyết theo hướng tất cả các bên mâu thuẫn đều được lợi. Bởi vì nếu lợi ích kéo theo trong việc giải quyết mâu thuẫn chỉ đến với một bên, mâu thuẫn xoay quanh vấn đề tranh cãi đó sẽ tiếp tục. Thêm vào đó, cũng không được quên rằng phải giải quyết theo hướng phù hợp với lợi ích của toàn thể nhân dân thì phương án giải quyết mới nhận được sự ủng hộ của nhân dân.
g_text_translate.en: In modern society, the relationship of interest groups is complicatedly intertwined, so there are many social conflicts. Many social conflicts constantly occur for many reasons, from conflicts involving socio-cultural factors to conflicts with economic causes. <u>However, if these contradictions are properly adjusted through compromise, then it can be used as a driving force for social unity.</u> Therefore, in order to resolve social conflicts in a reasonable way, social members need to develop principles of resolution that all agree on. It is important to solve it autonomously first. That is, priority should be given to efforts to resolve the controversial issue through free dialogue and negotiation between the parties. After that, it must be resolved in a way that all parties to the conflict benefit. Because if the resulting interest in conflict resolution is only for one party, the conflict surrounding the contentious issue will continue. In addition, it must not be forgotten that the solution must be resolved in a manner consistent with the interests of the entire people in order for the solution to receive the support of the people.
g_text_translate.fr:
Dans la société moderne, la relation entre les groupes d'intérêts est compliquée, de sorte qu'il existe de nombreux conflits sociaux. De nombreux conflits sociaux se produisent constamment pour de nombreuses raisons, allant des conflits impliquant des facteurs socioculturels aux conflits ayant des causes économiques. <u>Cependant, si ces contradictions sont correctement ajustées par le compromis, elles peuvent alors être utilisées comme force motrice pour l'unité sociale.</u> Par conséquent, afin de résoudre les conflits sociaux de manière raisonnable, les membres sociaux doivent développer des principes de résolution sur laquelle tous sont d'accord. Il est important de le résoudre de manière autonome en premier. Autrement dit, la priorité devrait être accordée aux efforts visant à résoudre la question controversée par le dialogue libre et la négociation entre les parties. Après cela, il doit être résolu de manière à ce que toutes les parties au conflit en bénéficient. Parce que si l'intérêt qui en résulte pour la résolution des conflits n'est que pour une seule partie, le conflit entourant la question litigieuse se poursuivra. De plus, il ne faut pas oublier que la solution doit être résolue d'une manière compatible avec les intérêts du peuple tout entier pour que la solution reçoive l'appui du peuple.

#######

In modern society, the relationship of interest groups is complicatedly intertwined, so there are many social conflicts. Many social conflicts constantly occur for many reasons, from conflicts involving socio-cultural factors to conflicts with economic causes. <u>However, if these contradictions are properly adjusted through compromise, then it can be used as a driving force for social unity.</u> Therefore, in order to resolve social conflicts in a reasonable way, social members need to develop principles of resolution that all agree on. It is important to solve it autonomously first. That is, priority should be given to efforts to resolve the controversial issue through free dialogue and negotiation between the parties. After that, it must be resolved in a way that all parties to the conflict benefit. Because if the resulting interest in conflict resolution is only for one party, the conflict surrounding the contentious issue will continue. In addition, it must not be forgotten that the solution must be resolved in a manner consistent with the interests of the entire people in order for the solution to receive the support of the people.
g_text_translate.es:
En la sociedad moderna, la relación de los grupos de interés está complicadamente entrelazada, por lo que existen muchos conflictos sociales. Muchos conflictos sociales ocurren constantemente por muchas razones, desde conflictos que involucran factores socioculturales hasta conflictos con causas económicas. <u>Sin embargo, si estas contradicciones se ajustan adecuadamente a través del compromiso, entonces pueden usarse como una fuerza impulsora para la unidad social.</u> Por lo tanto, para resolver los conflictos sociales de manera razonable, los miembros sociales necesitan desarrollar principios de resolución en la que todos estén de acuerdo. Es importante resolverlo primero de forma autónoma. Es decir, se debe dar prioridad a los esfuerzos para resolver el tema controvertido a través del diálogo libre y la negociación entre las partes. Después de eso, debe resolverse de manera que todas las partes del conflicto se beneficien. Porque si el interés resultante en la resolución del conflicto es sólo de una de las partes, el conflicto en torno al asunto contencioso continuará. Además, no debe olvidarse que la solución debe ser resuelta de manera congruente con los intereses de todo el pueblo para que la solución reciba el apoyo del pueblo.

#######

In modern society, the relationship of interest groups is complicatedly intertwined, so there are many social conflicts. Many social conflicts constantly occur for many reasons, from conflicts involving socio-cultural factors to conflicts with economic causes. <u>However, if these contradictions are properly adjusted through compromise, then it can be used as a driving force for social unity.</u> Therefore, in order to resolve social conflicts in a reasonable way, social members need to develop principles of resolution that all agree on. It is important to solve it autonomously first. That is, priority should be given to efforts to resolve the controversial issue through free dialogue and negotiation between the parties. After that, it must be resolved in a way that all parties to the conflict benefit. Because if the resulting interest in conflict resolution is only for one party, the conflict surrounding the contentious issue will continue. In addition, it must not be forgotten that the solution must be resolved in a manner consistent with the interests of the entire people in order for the solution to receive the support of the people.
g_text_translate.id:
Dalam masyarakat modern, hubungan kelompok kepentingan terjalin secara rumit, sehingga banyak terjadi konflik sosial. Banyak konflik sosial terus-menerus terjadi karena berbagai alasan, mulai dari konflik yang melibatkan faktor sosial budaya hingga konflik dengan penyebab ekonomi. <u>Namun, jika kontradiksi ini disesuaikan dengan baik melalui kompromi, maka hal itu dapat digunakan sebagai kekuatan pendorong untuk persatuan sosial.</u> Oleh karena itu, untuk menyelesaikan konflik sosial dengan cara yang wajar, anggota sosial perlu mengembangkan prinsip resolusi yang disetujui semua orang. Penting untuk menyelesaikannya secara mandiri terlebih dahulu. Artinya, prioritas harus diberikan pada upaya untuk menyelesaikan masalah kontroversial melalui dialog bebas dan negosiasi antara para pihak. Setelah itu, harus diselesaikan dengan cara yang menguntungkan semua pihak yang berkonflik. Karena jika kepentingan yang dihasilkan dalam penyelesaian konflik hanya untuk satu pihak, konflik seputar isu kontroversial akan terus berlanjut. Selain itu, tidak boleh dilupakan bahwa penyelesaiannya harus dilakukan dengan cara yang sesuai dengan kepentingan seluruh rakyat agar solusi tersebut mendapat dukungan rakyat.

#######

In modern society, the relationship of interest groups is complicatedly intertwined, so there are many social conflicts. Many social conflicts constantly occur for many reasons, from conflicts involving socio-cultural factors to conflicts with economic causes. <u>However, if these contradictions are properly adjusted through compromise, then it can be used as a driving force for social unity.</u> Therefore, in order to resolve social conflicts in a reasonable way, social members need to develop principles of resolution that all agree on. It is important to solve it autonomously first. That is, priority should be given to efforts to resolve the controversial issue through free dialogue and negotiation between the parties. After that, it must be resolved in a way that all parties to the conflict benefit. Because if the resulting interest in conflict resolution is only for one party, the conflict surrounding the contentious issue will continue. In addition, it must not be forgotten that the solution must be resolved in a manner consistent with the interests of the entire people in order for the solution to receive the support of the people.
g_text_translate.ja:
現代社会では、利益団体同士の関係が複雑に絡み合っているため、社会的な対立が多くあります。多くの社会的紛争は、社会文化的要因を伴う紛争から経済的原因による紛争まで、さまざまな理由で常に発生しています。 <u>しかし、これらの矛盾が妥協によって適切に調整されれば、それは社会的団結の原動力として使用できます。</u>したがって、社会的対立を合理的な方法で解決するために、社会的構成員は原則を開発する必要があります。全員が同意する決議のまずは自律的に解決することが重要です。つまり、当事者間の自由な対話と交渉を通じて論争の的となっている問題を解決するための努力が優先されるべきです。その後、紛争のすべての当事者が利益を得る方法で解決する必要があります。紛争解決における結果として得られる利益が一方の当事者だけのものである場合、論争の的となっている問題をめぐる紛争は継続するからです。また、その解決が国民の支持を得るためには、国民全体の利益に合致する形で解決されなければならないことを忘れてはならない。

#######

In modern society, the relationship of interest groups is complicatedly intertwined, so there are many social conflicts. Many social conflicts constantly occur for many reasons, from conflicts involving socio-cultural factors to conflicts with economic causes. <u>However, if these contradictions are properly adjusted through compromise, then it can be used as a driving force for social unity.</u> Therefore, in order to resolve social conflicts in a reasonable way, social members need to develop principles of resolution that all agree on. It is important to solve it autonomously first. That is, priority should be given to efforts to resolve the controversial issue through free dialogue and negotiation between the parties. After that, it must be resolved in a way that all parties to the conflict benefit. Because if the resulting interest in conflict resolution is only for one party, the conflict surrounding the contentious issue will continue. In addition, it must not be forgotten that the solution must be resolved in a manner consistent with the interests of the entire people in order for the solution to receive the support of the people.
g_text_translate.de:
In der modernen Gesellschaft ist das Verhältnis der Interessengruppen kompliziert verflochten, daher gibt es viele soziale Konflikte. Viele soziale Konflikte treten ständig aus vielen Gründen auf, von Konflikten mit soziokulturellen Faktoren bis hin zu Konflikten mit wirtschaftlichen Ursachen. <u>Wenn diese Widersprüche jedoch durch Kompromisse richtig ausgeglichen werden, dann kann dies als treibende Kraft für soziale Einheit genutzt werden.</u> Um soziale Konflikte vernünftig zu lösen, müssen soziale Mitglieder daher Prinzipien entwickeln einer Auflösung, auf die sich alle einigen. Es ist wichtig, es zuerst autonom zu lösen. Das heißt, Bemühungen zur Lösung der umstrittenen Frage durch freien Dialog und Verhandlungen zwischen den Parteien sollten Vorrang haben. Danach muss er so gelöst werden, dass alle Konfliktparteien davon profitieren. Denn wenn das daraus resultierende Interesse an einer Konfliktlösung nur für eine Partei gilt, wird der Konflikt um das Streitthema weitergehen. Darüber hinaus darf nicht vergessen werden, dass die Lösung im Einklang mit den Interessen des gesamten Volkes gelöst werden muss, damit die Lösung die Unterstützung des Volkes findet.

#######

In modern society, the relationship of interest groups is complicatedly intertwined, so there are many social conflicts. Many social conflicts constantly occur for many reasons, from conflicts involving socio-cultural factors to conflicts with economic causes. <u>However, if these contradictions are properly adjusted through compromise, then it can be used as a driving force for social unity.</u> Therefore, in order to resolve social conflicts in a reasonable way, social members need to develop principles of resolution that all agree on. It is important to solve it autonomously first. That is, priority should be given to efforts to resolve the controversial issue through free dialogue and negotiation between the parties. After that, it must be resolved in a way that all parties to the conflict benefit. Because if the resulting interest in conflict resolution is only for one party, the conflict surrounding the contentious issue will continue. In addition, it must not be forgotten that the solution must be resolved in a manner consistent with the interests of the entire people in order for the solution to receive the support of the people.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
现代社会，利益集团的关系错综复杂，社会矛盾多。许多社会冲突不断发生，原因有很多，从涉及社会文化因素的冲突到与经济原因的冲突。 <u>但是，如果这些矛盾通过妥协得到适当的调整，就可以成为社会团结的动力。</u>因此，为了以合理的方式化解社会矛盾，社会成员需要制定原则所有人都同意的决议。首先自主解决它很重要。也就是说，应优先考虑通过各方自由对话和谈判来解决有争议的问题。在那之后，它必须以冲突各方都能受益的方式解决。因为如果由此产生的对解决冲突的兴趣只属于一方，那么围绕有争议问题的冲突将继续存在。此外，不要忘记，解决方案必须以符合全体人民利益的方式解决，才能得到人民的支持。

g_text_translate.it:
Nella società moderna, la relazione dei gruppi di interesse è complicatamente intrecciata, quindi ci sono molti conflitti sociali. Molti conflitti sociali si verificano costantemente per molte ragioni, dai conflitti che coinvolgono fattori socio-culturali ai conflitti con cause economiche. <u>Tuttavia, se queste contraddizioni vengono opportunamente aggiustate attraverso il compromesso, allora può essere utilizzato come forza trainante per l'unità sociale.</u> Pertanto, per risolvere i conflitti sociali in modo ragionevole, i membri sociali devono sviluppare dei principi di risoluzione su cui tutti sono d'accordo. È importante risolverlo autonomamente prima. Cioè, la priorità dovrebbe essere data agli sforzi per risolvere la questione controversa attraverso il libero dialogo e la negoziazione tra le parti. Successivamente, deve essere risolto in modo che tutte le parti in conflitto ne traggano vantaggio. Perché se l'interesse risultante alla risoluzione del conflitto è solo per una delle parti, il conflitto che circonda la questione controversa continuerà. Inoltre, non bisogna dimenticare che la soluzione deve essere risolta in modo coerente con gli interessi dell'intero popolo affinché la soluzione riceva il sostegno del popolo.

g_text_translate.ru:
В современном обществе взаимоотношения групп интересов сложно переплетены, поэтому возникает множество социальных конфликтов. Многие социальные конфликты постоянно возникают по разным причинам: от конфликтов, затрагивающих социокультурные факторы, до конфликтов экономического характера. <u>Однако, если эти противоречия правильно скорректировать путем компромисса, то их можно использовать как движущую силу социального единства.</u> Следовательно, чтобы разумным образом разрешать социальные конфликты, членам общества необходимо выработать принципы резолюции, с которой все согласны. Важно сначала решить ее самостоятельно. То есть приоритет должен быть отдан усилиям по разрешению спорного вопроса посредством свободного диалога и переговоров между сторонами. После этого его необходимо решить так, чтобы от этого выиграли все стороны конфликта. Потому что, если в результате заинтересованность в разрешении конфликта будет только у одной стороны, конфликт вокруг спорного вопроса будет продолжаться. Кроме того, не следует забывать, что решение должно быть решено в соответствии с интересами всего народа, чтобы решение получило поддержку народа.
