Above all, confusion in the field is expected. According to the system, autonomous police are in charge of life safety such as traffic accidents and domestic violence investigations. As such, when the police organization has a dual structure, it can be the people who suffer from difficulties. This is because, if an incident in which the division of territory is ambiguous occurs, the local police and the national police may mobilize together or pass the case on to each other, and a prompt and detailed response may not be made. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.
g_text_translate.ja:
今年は「自治警察制度」が全国に拡大される見通しだ。自治警察制度とは、地方自治体が警察の運営・管理を担う制度のことです。 <u>この制度が導入されれば、警察は地域住民の生活に密着し、地域の特性に合わせたさまざまなサービスを提供できるようになります。</u>しかし、制度上の弱点や予見可能な副作用が生じる可能性があります。何より現場の混乱が予想されます。同制度によると、自治警察は、交通事故や家庭内暴力の捜査など、生命の安全を担当している。このように、警察組織が二重構造になると、困るのは本人です。所轄が曖昧な事件が発生した場合、地方警察と国家警察が連携したり、お互いに事案をすり合わせたりして、迅速かつ詳細な対応ができなくなる可能性があるためである。業務上の紛争や混乱により公安の質が低下すれば、新制度導入の意義が薄れる可能性がある。

#######

This year, the ‘autonomous police system’ is expected to be expanded nationwide. The autonomous police system refers to a system in which local governments are in charge of the operation and management of the police. <u>If this system is implemented, the police will be closely related to the lives of local residents and will be able to provide various services tailored to local characteristics.</u> However, there may be institutional weaknesses and foreseeable side effects. Above all, confusion in the field is expected. According to the system, autonomous police are in charge of life safety such as traffic accidents and domestic violence investigations. As such, when the police organization has a dual structure, it can be the people who suffer from difficulties. This is because, if an incident in which the division of territory is ambiguous occurs, the local police and the national police may mobilize together or pass the case on to each other, and a prompt and detailed response may not be made. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.
g_text_translate.de:
In diesem Jahr soll das „autonome Polizeisystem“ bundesweit ausgebaut werden. Das autonome Polizeisystem bezieht sich auf ein System, in dem lokale Regierungen für den Betrieb und die Verwaltung der Polizei verantwortlich sind. <u>Wenn dieses System implementiert wird, wird die Polizei eng mit dem Leben der Anwohner verbunden sein und verschiedene Dienstleistungen anbieten können, die auf lokale Besonderheiten zugeschnitten sind.</u> Allerdings kann es institutionelle Schwächen und vorhersehbare Nebenwirkungen geben. Vor allem ist mit Verwirrung im Feld zu rechnen. Dem System zufolge ist die autonome Polizei für den Lebensschutz wie Verkehrsunfälle und Ermittlungen wegen häuslicher Gewalt zuständig. Wenn also die Polizeiorganisation eine duale Struktur hat, können es die Menschen sein, die unter Schwierigkeiten leiden. Denn wenn es zu einem Vorfall kommt, bei dem die Gebietsaufteilung nicht eindeutig ist, können die örtliche Polizei und die nationale Polizei gemeinsam mobil werden oder den Fall aneinander weitergeben, und eine sofortige und detaillierte Reaktion kann nicht erfolgen. Wenn sich die Qualität der öffentlichen Sicherheit aufgrund von geschäftlichen Konflikten und Verwirrung verschlechtert, kann die Bedeutung der Implementierung des neuen Systems verringert werden.

#######

This year, the ‘autonomous police system’ is expected to be expanded nationwide. The autonomous police system refers to a system in which local governments are in charge of the operation and management of the police. <u>If this system is implemented, the police will be closely related to the lives of local residents and will be able to provide various services tailored to local characteristics.</u> However, there may be institutional weaknesses and foreseeable side effects. Above all, confusion in the field is expected. According to the system, autonomous police are in charge of life safety such as traffic accidents and domestic violence investigations. As such, when the police organization has a dual structure, it can be the people who suffer from difficulties. This is because, if an incident in which the division of territory is ambiguous occurs, the local police and the national police may mobilize together or pass the case on to each other, and a prompt and detailed response may not be made. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
今年，“自治警察系统”有望在全国范围内扩大。自治警察制度是指由地方政府负责警察运作和管理的制度。 <u>如果这个系统实施，警察将与当地居民的生活密切相关，将能够提供适合当地特色的各种服务。</u>但可能存在制度薄弱和可预见的副作用。最重要的是，预计该领域会出现混乱。根据该系统，自治警察负责交通事故和家庭暴力调查等生命安全。因此，当警察组织具有双重结构时，受苦的可能是人民。这是因为，如果发生领土划分不明确的事件，地方警察和国家警察可能会一起调动或相互转告，可能无法迅速、详细地作出反应。如果公共安全质量因业务冲突和混乱而恶化，新制度实施的意义可能会降低。

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
今年，“自治警察系統”有望在全國范圍內擴大。自治警察制度是指由地方政府負責警察運作和管理的製度。 <u>如果這個系統實施，警察將與當地居民的生活密切相關，將能夠提供適合當地特色的各種服務。</u>但可能存在製度薄弱和可預見的副作用。最重要的是，預計該領域會出現混亂。根據該系統，自治警察負責交通事故和家庭暴力調查等生命安全。因此，當警察組織具有雙重結構時，受苦的可能是人民。這是因為，如果發生領土劃分不明確的事件，地方警察和國家警察可能會一起調動或相互轉告，可能無法迅速、詳細地作出反應。如果公共安全質量因業務衝突和混亂而惡化，新制度實施的意義可能會降低。

g_text_translate.it:
Quest'anno, il "sistema di polizia autonomo" dovrebbe essere ampliato a livello nazionale. Il sistema di polizia autonomo si riferisce a un sistema in cui i governi locali sono responsabili del funzionamento e della gestione della polizia. <u>Se questo sistema viene implementato, la polizia sarà strettamente legata alla vita dei residenti locali e sarà in grado di fornire vari servizi adattati alle caratteristiche locali.</u> Tuttavia, potrebbero esserci debolezze istituzionali ed effetti collaterali prevedibili. Si prevede soprattutto confusione in campo. Secondo il sistema, la polizia autonoma è responsabile della sicurezza della vita come gli incidenti stradali e le indagini sulla violenza domestica. Pertanto, quando l'organizzazione di polizia ha una struttura duale, possono essere le persone a soffrire di difficoltà. Questo perché, se si verifica un incidente in cui la divisione del territorio è ambigua, la polizia locale e la polizia nazionale possono mobilitarsi insieme o passarsi reciprocamente il caso, e potrebbe non essere fornita una risposta tempestiva e dettagliata. Se la qualità della sicurezza pubblica si deteriora a causa di conflitti commerciali e confusione, l'importanza dell'attuazione del nuovo sistema potrebbe diminuire.

g_text_translate.ru:
Ожидается, что в этом году «автономная полицейская система» будет расширена по всей стране. Автономная полицейская система представляет собой систему, в которой местные органы власти отвечают за работу полиции и управление ею. <u>Если эта система будет внедрена, полиция будет тесно связана с жизнью местных жителей и сможет предоставлять различные услуги с учетом местных особенностей.</u> Однако могут иметь место институциональные слабости и предсказуемые побочные эффекты. Прежде всего, ожидается путаница в этой области. Согласно системе, автономная полиция отвечает за безопасность жизни, например, за расследование дорожно-транспортных происшествий и случаев домашнего насилия. Таким образом, когда полицейская организация имеет двойную структуру, трудности могут возникнуть у людей. Это связано с тем, что в случае возникновения инцидента, в ходе которого разделение территории является неоднозначным, местная полиция и национальная полиция могут мобилизоваться вместе или передать дело друг другу, и быстрый и подробный ответ не может быть предоставлен. Если качество общественной безопасности ухудшится из-за деловых конфликтов и неразберихи, значимость внедрения новой системы может снизиться.

g_text_translate.th:
ปีนี้คาดว่าจะขยาย “ระบบตำรวจอิสระ” ทั่วประเทศ ระบบตำรวจปกครองตนเอง หมายถึง ระบบที่รัฐบาลท้องถิ่นมีหน้าที่รับผิดชอบในการดำเนินการและบริหารจัดการตำรวจ <u>หากระบบนี้ถูกนำไปใช้ ตำรวจจะมีความเกี่ยวข้องอย่างใกล้ชิดกับชีวิตของผู้อยู่อาศัยในท้องถิ่น และจะสามารถให้บริการต่างๆ ที่ปรับให้เหมาะกับลักษณะเฉพาะของท้องถิ่นได้</u> อย่างไรก็ตาม อาจมีจุดอ่อนของสถาบันและผลข้างเคียงที่คาดการณ์ได้ เหนือสิ่งอื่นใด คาดว่าจะเกิดความสับสนในสนาม ตามระบบดังกล่าว ตำรวจอิสระมีหน้าที่รับผิดชอบด้านความปลอดภัยในชีวิต เช่น อุบัติเหตุจราจร และการสืบสวนความรุนแรงในครอบครัว เมื่อองค์กรตำรวจมีโครงสร้างทวิภาคีก็อาจเป็นประชาชนที่เดือดร้อนได้ เพราะหากเกิดเหตุการณ์การแบ่งแยกดินแดนคลุมเครือ ตำรวจท้องที่ และตำรวจแห่งชาติอาจระดมกำลังกันหรือส่งต่อคดีให้กัน และไม่อาจโต้ตอบโดยเร็วและละเอียดได้ หากคุณภาพการรักษาความปลอดภัยสาธารณะลดลงเนื่องจากความขัดแย้งและความสับสนทางธุรกิจ ความสำคัญของการนำระบบใหม่ไปใช้อาจลดลง

#######

This year, the ‘autonomous police system’ is expected to be expanded nationwide. The autonomous police system refers to a system in which local governments are in charge of the operation and management of the police. <u>If this system is implemented, the police will be closely related to the lives of local residents and will be able to provide various services tailored to local characteristics.</u> However, there may be institutional weaknesses and foreseeable side effects. Above all, confusion in the field is expected. According to the system, autonomous police are in charge of life safety such as traffic accidents and domestic violence investigations. As such, when the police organization has a dual structure, it can be the people who suffer from difficulties. This is because, if an incident in which the division of territory is ambiguous occurs, the local police and the national police may mobilize together or pass the case on to each other, and a prompt and detailed response may not be made. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.
g_text_translate.pt:
Este ano, espera-se que o “sistema policial autónomo” seja expandido a nível nacional. O sistema policial autônomo refere-se a um sistema no qual os governos locais são responsáveis ​​pela operação e gestão da polícia. <u>Se este sistema for implementado, a polícia estará intimamente relacionada com a vida dos residentes locais e será capaz de fornecer vários serviços adaptados às características locais.</u> No entanto, pode haver fraquezas institucionais e efeitos secundários previsíveis. Acima de tudo, espera-se confusão no campo. De acordo com o sistema, a polícia autônoma é responsável pela segurança da vida, como acidentes de trânsito e investigações de violência doméstica. Assim, quando a organização policial tem uma estrutura dupla, podem ser as pessoas que sofrem com dificuldades. Isto porque, se ocorrer um incidente em que a divisão do território seja ambígua, a polícia local e a polícia nacional podem mobilizar-se em conjunto ou transmitir o caso uma à outra, podendo não ser dada uma resposta rápida e detalhada. Se a qualidade da segurança pública se deteriorar devido a conflitos e confusões comerciais, a importância da implementação do novo sistema poderá diminuir.

#######

The autonomous police system refers to a system in which local governments are in charge of the operation and management of the police. <u>If this system is implemented, the police will be closely related to the lives of local residents and will be able to provide various services tailored to local characteristics.</u> However, there may be institutional weaknesses and foreseeable side effects. Above all, confusion in the field is expected. According to the system, autonomous police are in charge of life safety such as traffic accidents and domestic violence investigations. As such, when the police organization has a dual structure, it can be the people who suffer from difficulties. This is because, if an incident in which the division of territory is ambiguous occurs, the local police and the national police may mobilize together or pass the case on to each other, and a prompt and detailed response may not be made. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.
g_text_translate.hi:
इस साल देशभर में 'स्वायत्त पुलिस व्यवस्था' का विस्तार होने की उम्मीद है। स्वायत्त पुलिस प्रणाली से तात्पर्य उस प्रणाली से है जिसमें स्थानीय सरकारें पुलिस के संचालन और प्रबंधन की प्रभारी होती हैं। <u>यदि यह प्रणाली लागू की जाती है, तो पुलिस स्थानीय निवासियों के जीवन से निकटता से जुड़ी होगी और स्थानीय विशेषताओं के अनुरूप विभिन्न सेवाएं प्रदान करने में सक्षम होगी।</u> हालांकि, संस्थागत कमजोरियां और संभावित दुष्प्रभाव हो सकते हैं। सबसे बढ़कर, कार्यक्षेत्र में भ्रम की आशंका है। प्रणाली के अनुसार, स्वायत्त पुलिस जीवन सुरक्षा जैसे यातायात दुर्घटनाओं और घरेलू हिंसा जांच की प्रभारी होती है। ऐसे में, जब पुलिस संगठन में दोहरी संरचना होती है, तो लोगों को कठिनाइयों का सामना करना पड़ सकता है। ऐसा इसलिए है, क्योंकि यदि कोई ऐसी घटना घटती है जिसमें क्षेत्र का विभाजन अस्पष्ट है, तो स्थानीय पुलिस और राष्ट्रीय पुलिस एक साथ जुट सकती हैं या मामले को एक-दूसरे को सौंप सकती हैं, और त्वरित और विस्तृत प्रतिक्रिया नहीं दी जा सकती है। यदि व्यावसायिक संघर्षों और भ्रम के कारण सार्वजनिक सुरक्षा की गुणवत्ता बिगड़ती है, तो नई प्रणाली के कार्यान्वयन का महत्व कम हो सकता है।

#######

This year, the ‘autonomous police system’ is expected to be expanded nationwide. The autonomous police system refers to a system in which local governments are in charge of the operation and management of the police. <u>If this system is implemented, the police will be closely related to the lives of local residents and will be able to provide various services tailored to local characteristics.</u> However, there may be institutional weaknesses and foreseeable side effects. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.
g_text_translate.tr:
Bu yıl 'özerk polis sisteminin' ülke çapında yaygınlaştırılması bekleniyor. Özerk polis sistemi, yerel yönetimlerin polisin işleyişinden ve yönetiminden sorumlu olduğu sistemi ifade etmektedir. <u>Bu sistemin hayata geçirilmesi durumunda polis, yerel halkın yaşamlarıyla yakından ilgili olacak ve yerel özelliklere uygun çeşitli hizmetler sunabilecektir.</u> Ancak kurumsal zayıflıklar ve öngörülebilir yan etkiler söz konusu olabilir. Her şeyden önce sahada kafa karışıklığı bekleniyor. Sisteme göre trafik kazaları, aile içi şiddet soruşturmaları gibi can güvenliğinden özerk polis sorumlu. Hal böyle olunca polis teşkilatı ikili bir yapıya sahip olduğunda sıkıntı çeken kişiler olabiliyor. Çünkü bölge paylaşımının belirsiz olduğu bir olay meydana gelirse, yerel polis ve ulusal polis birlikte harekete geçebilir veya konuyu birbirlerine aktarabilir ve hızlı ve ayrıntılı bir yanıt verilemeyebilir. İş çatışmaları ve kafa karışıklığı nedeniyle kamu güvenliğinin kalitesi bozulursa, yeni sistemin uygulanmasının önemi azalabilir.

#######

This year, the ‘autonomous police system’ is expected to be expanded nationwide. The autonomous police system refers to a system in which local governments are in charge of the operation and management of the police. <u>If this system is implemented, the police will be closely related to the lives of local residents and will be able to provide various services tailored to local characteristics.</u> However, there may be institutional weaknesses and foreseeable side effects. Above all, confusion in the field is expected. According to the system, autonomous police are in charge of life safety such as traffic accidents and domestic violence investigations. As such, when the police organization has a dual structure, it can be the people who suffer from difficulties. If the quality of public security deteriorates due to business conflicts and confusion, the significance of the implementation of the new system may be diminished.

explain.vi:
Chọn câu đúng với thái độ của người viết thể hiện trong phần gạch chân.
1. Dự đoán về sự thay đổi quan hệ của cảnh sát và người dân địa phương.
2. Trông đợi ảnh hưởng tích cực của hệ thống cảnh sát địa phương đối với người dân.
3. Nhấn mạnh điều kiện dịch vụ mà hệ thống cảnh sát địa phương phải cung cấp.
4. Lo rằng dịch vụ thân thiện với địa phương chỉ đổ dồn về một số địa phương nhất định.
--------------------
긍정적 영향: Ảnh hưởng tích cực
기대하다: Trông đợi
밀착되다: Gần gũi
특성에 맞다: Phù hợp với đặc điểm

Hệ thống cảnh sát địa phương giúp cảnh sát gần gũi hơn với người dân và cung cấp dịch vụ phù hợp với địa phương. Đây là những ảnh hưởng tích cực.

เลือกคำตอบที่เหมาะสมกับทัศนคติของผู้เขียนตามที่ระบุไว้ในส่วนที่ขีดเส้นใต้
1. คาดการณ์การเปลี่ยนแปลงความสัมพันธ์ระหว่างตำรวจท้องที่กับประชาชนในพื้นที่
2. คาดหวังว่าระบบตำรวจอิสระจะส่งผลดีต่อผู้อยู่อาศัย
3. เน้นย้ำเงื่อนไขการให้บริการที่ระบบตำรวจอิสระต้องจัดให้มี
4. กังวลว่าบริการที่เป็นมิตรต่อท้องถิ่นจะกระจุกตัวอยู่ในบางภูมิภาค
--------------------

<g>기대하다:</g>ที่จะคาดหวัง
<g>밀착되다:</g>ที่จะได้ใกล้ชิด
<g>특성에 맞다:</g>เพื่อให้ตรงกับคุณลักษณะของตนเอง

ระบบตำรวจท้องที่ช่วยให้ตำรวจใกล้ชิดกับประชาชนและให้บริการที่เหมาะสมกับท้องถิ่น สิ่งเหล่านี้เป็นผลเชิงบวก

explain.hi:
वह उत्तर चुनें जो लेखक के दृष्टिकोण के अनुकूल हो जैसा कि रेखांकित भाग में दर्शाया गया है।
1. स्थानीय पुलिस और स्थानीय निवासियों के बीच संबंधों में बदलाव की आशा करना।
2. आशा है कि स्वायत्त पुलिस व्यवस्था का निवासियों पर सकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ेगा।
3. स्वायत्त पुलिस प्रणाली द्वारा प्रदान की जाने वाली सेवाओं की शर्तों पर जोर देना।
4. चिंतित रहें कि स्थानीय-अनुकूल सेवाएँ कुछ क्षेत्रों में केंद्रित होंगी।
------------------------

<g>밀착되다:</g>बंद करने के लिए
<g>특성에 맞다:</g>किसी की विशेषताओं से मेल खाना

स्थानीय पुलिस प्रणाली पुलिस को लोगों के करीब रहने और स्थानीय रूप से उचित सेवाएं प्रदान करने में मदद करती है। ये सकारात्मक प्रभाव हैं.

general.g_text:
인간은 끊임없이 욕망을 느끼는 존재이고 그 욕망은 세상을 움직이는 원동력이다. 산다는 것은 음식, 물질, 명예, 행복 등 무언가를 부단히 좇는 위이며, 욕망은 적절한 보상을 통해 인간의 이러한 행동을 지속시키기 때문이다. 이와 같이 인간은 (     ) 현실에 안주하지 않고 끊임없이 자연을 정복하고 문명을 꽃피우면서 만물의 영장이 될 수 있었다. 인간이 누리고 있는 오늘날의 물질적 풍요는 모두 욕망에서 비롯되었다고 하겠다. 
그러나 일단 인간이 어떤 대상을 통해 쾌락을 얻는 경험을 하고 나면 욕망은 더 큰 쾌락을 요구한다. 뿐만 아니라 인간은 욕망이 안겨 준 보상을 타인의 것과 비교하면서 상대적인 박탈감과 불만족에 시달리기도 한다. 이렇게 맹목적으로 욕망을 좇다 보면 엄청난 물질적 풍요를 누리면서도 정신적으로는 궁핍한 삶을 살게 될 수 있다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Con người là một đối tượng không ngừng cảm thấy mong muốn, và chính mong muốn đó là động lực dịch chuyển thế giới.  Bởi vì sống là không ngừng theo đuổi một thứ gì đó, chẳng hạn như thức ăn, vật chất, danh dự hoặc hạnh phúc và sự mong muốn duy trì hành động này của con người nhờ vào phần thưởng xứng đáng. Theo cách này, con người đã không chấp nhận (     )  trong thực tại và có thể trở thành chúa tể của vạn vật bằng cách không ngừng chinh phục thiên nhiên và phát triển nền văn minh rực rỡ.
Tuy nhiên, một khi con người trải nghiệm việc đạt được khoái cảm từ một đối tượng nào đó, thì mong muốn đòi hỏi những khoái cảm lớn hơn. Không chỉ vậy, con người cũng thường so sánh phần thưởng mà mong muốn mang đến cho mình với của người người khác và cảm thấy đau khổ vì cảm giác bị tước đoạt và không thỏa mãn. Nếu theo đuổi mong muốn một cách mù quáng, dù tận hưởng sự dư dả về vật chất cũng có thể sẽ sống cuộc sống nghèo nàn về tinh thần.
g_text_translate.en:
Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les êtres humains ressentent constamment du désir, et ce désir est la force motrice qui fait bouger le monde. En effet, vivre, c'est rechercher constamment quelque chose comme la nourriture, le matériel, la gloire et le bonheur, et le désir soutient le comportement humain grâce à des récompenses appropriées. En tant que tels, les êtres humains poursuivent des désirs, ils ont donc pu devenir les seigneurs de toutes choses en conquérant constamment la nature et en florissant la civilisation sans se contenter de la réalité. On peut dire que toute la richesse matérielle dont les humains jouissent aujourd'hui vient du désir.
Cependant, une fois qu'une personne a l'expérience d'obtenir du plaisir à partir d'un objet, le désir exige un plus grand plaisir. De plus, les humains souffrent souvent de privation et d'insatisfaction relatives en comparant les récompenses du désir avec celles des autres. S'il poursuit aveuglément ses désirs de cette manière, il peut mener une vie de privation spirituelle tout en jouissant d'une formidable abondance matérielle.

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.es:
El ser humano está constantemente sintiendo deseo, y ese deseo es el motor que mueve el mundo. Esto se debe a que vivir es buscar constantemente algo como comida, material, fama y felicidad, y el deseo sustenta el comportamiento humano a través de recompensas apropiadas. Como tales, los seres humanos persiguen deseos, por lo que pudieron convertirse en los señores de todas las cosas al conquistar constantemente la naturaleza y la civilización floreciente sin ser complacientes con la realidad. Se puede decir que toda la riqueza material de la que disfrutan los humanos hoy proviene del deseo.
Sin embargo, una vez que una persona tiene la experiencia de obtener placer de un objeto, el deseo exige mayor placer. Además, los humanos a menudo sufren privaciones e insatisfacciones relativas al comparar las recompensas del deseo con las de los demás. Si persigue ciegamente sus deseos de esta manera, puede llevar una vida espiritualmente privada mientras disfruta de una tremenda abundancia material.

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.id:
Manusia terus-menerus merasakan keinginan, dan keinginan itu adalah kekuatan pendorong yang menggerakkan dunia. Ini karena hidup adalah terus-menerus mengejar sesuatu seperti makanan, materi, ketenaran, dan kebahagiaan, dan keinginan menopang perilaku manusia melalui imbalan yang sesuai. Dengan demikian, manusia mengejar keinginan, sehingga mereka mampu menjadi penguasa segala sesuatu dengan terus-menerus menaklukkan alam dan mengembangkan peradaban tanpa berpuas diri dengan kenyataan. Dapat dikatakan bahwa semua kekayaan materi yang dinikmati manusia saat ini berasal dari keinginan.
Namun, begitu seseorang memiliki pengalaman memperoleh kesenangan dari suatu objek, keinginan menuntut kesenangan yang lebih besar. Selain itu, manusia sering menderita kekurangan dan ketidakpuasan relatif dengan membandingkan imbalan keinginan dengan orang lain. Jika dia secara membabi buta mengejar keinginannya dengan cara ini, dia dapat menjalani kehidupan yang kekurangan spiritual sambil menikmati kelimpahan materi yang luar biasa.

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.ja:
人間は常に欲望を感じており、その欲望が世界を動かす原動力となっています。なぜなら、生きるということは、食物、物質、名声、幸福などを絶えず追求することであり、欲望は適切な報酬を通じて人間の行動を維持するからです.このように人間は欲望を追い求め、現実に甘んじることなく常に自然を征服し、文明を栄えさせることで万物の主となることができました。現代の人間が享受している物質的な豊かさは、すべて欲望から来ていると言えます。
しかし、ひとたび物から快楽を得た経験を持つと、欲望はより大きな快楽を要求するようになります。さらに、人間は、欲望の報酬を他人の報酬と比較することによって、相対的な剥奪と不満に苦しむことがよくあります。このようにやみくもに自分の欲望を追い求めるなら、物凄い豊かさを楽しみながら、精神的に奪われた生活を送ることができます。

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.de:
Menschen verspüren ständig Verlangen, und dieses Verlangen ist die treibende Kraft, die die Welt bewegt. Das liegt daran, dass Leben bedeutet, ständig nach etwas wie Essen, Material, Ruhm und Glück zu streben, und Begierde stützt menschliches Verhalten durch angemessene Belohnungen. Als solche verfolgen die Menschen Begierden, so dass sie die Herren aller Dinge werden konnten, indem sie ständig die Natur eroberten und die Zivilisation blühten, ohne sich mit der Realität zufrieden zu geben. Man kann sagen, dass der gesamte materielle Wohlstand, den die Menschen heute genießen, aus Begierde stammt.
Sobald eine Person jedoch die Erfahrung gemacht hat, Vergnügen an einem Objekt zu erlangen, verlangt das Begehren nach größerem Vergnügen. Darüber hinaus leiden Menschen oft unter relativer Entbehrung und Unzufriedenheit, wenn sie die Belohnungen des Begehrens mit denen anderer vergleichen. Wenn er auf diese Weise blindlings seinen Wünschen nachgeht, kann er ein spirituell entbehrungsreiches Leben führen, während er sich einer enormen materiellen Fülle erfreut.

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
人类不断地感受到欲望，而欲望是推动世界的动力。这是因为生活就是不断地追求食物、物质、名誉和幸福等东西，而欲望通过适当的回报来维持人类的行为。因此，人类追求欲望，因此能够不断征服自然，繁荣文明，而不满足于现实，成为万物之主。可以说，人类今天享受的所有物质富裕都来自欲望。
然而，一旦一个人有了从一个物体中获得快感的体验，欲望就需要更大的快感。此外，人类经常通过将欲望的回报与他人的回报进行比较而遭受相对剥夺和不满。如果他这样盲目地追求自己的欲望，他可以在享受巨大的物质财富的同时过着精神上被剥夺的生活。

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. g_text_translate.zh-TW:

然而，一旦一個人有了從一個物體中獲得快感的體驗，慾望就需要更大的快感。此外，人類經常通過將慾望的回報與他人的回報進行比較而遭受相對剝奪和不滿。如果他這樣盲目地追求自己的慾望，他可以在享受巨大的物質財富的同時過著精神上被剝奪的生活。

g_text_translate.it:
Gli esseri umani provano costantemente desiderio e quel desiderio è la forza motrice che muove il mondo. Questo perché vivere significa perseguire costantemente qualcosa come cibo, materiale, fama e felicità, e il desiderio sostiene il comportamento umano attraverso ricompense appropriate. In quanto tali, gli esseri umani perseguono i desideri, quindi sono stati in grado di diventare i signori di tutte le cose conquistando costantemente la natura e la fiorente civiltà senza essere compiacenti con la realtà. Si può dire che tutta la ricchezza materiale di cui godono oggi gli esseri umani provenga dal desiderio.
Tuttavia, una volta che una persona ha l'esperienza di ottenere piacere da un oggetto, il desiderio richiede un piacere maggiore. Inoltre, gli esseri umani spesso soffrono di relativa privazione e insoddisfazione confrontando le ricompense del desiderio con quelle degli altri. Se persegue ciecamente i suoi desideri in questo modo, può condurre una vita spiritualmente privata mentre gode di un'enorme abbondanza materiale.

#######

Human beings are constantly feeling desire, and that desire is the driving force that moves the world. This is because to live is to constantly pursue something such as food, material, fame, and happiness, and desire sustains human behavior through appropriate rewards. As such, human beings pursue desires, so they were able to become the lords of all things by constantly conquering nature and flourishing civilization without being complacent with reality. It can be said that all of the material affluence that humans enjoy today comes from desire.
However, once a person has the experience of obtaining pleasure from an object, desire demands greater pleasure. In addition, humans often suffer from relative deprivation and dissatisfaction by comparing the rewards of desire with those of others. If he blindly pursues his desires in this way, he can lead a spiritually deprived life while enjoying tremendous material abundance.
g_text_translate.ru:
Люди постоянно испытывают желание, и это желание является движущей силой, которая движет миром. Это потому, что жить — значит постоянно стремиться к чему-то, например, к еде, материальному, славе и счастью, а желание поддерживает человеческое поведение посредством соответствующих вознаграждений. Таким образом, люди преследуют свои желания, поэтому они смогли стать повелителями всего сущего, постоянно покоряя природу и процветая цивилизацию, не останавливаясь при этом на реальности. Можно сказать, что все материальное богатство, которым наслаждаются люди сегодня, происходит от желаний.
Однако, как только у человека появляется опыт получения удовольствия от объекта, желание требует большего удовольствия. Кроме того, люди часто страдают от относительной депривации и неудовлетворенности, сравнивая вознаграждение за свои желания с вознаграждением других. Если он слепо преследует свои желания таким образом, он может вести духовно лишенную жизнь, наслаждаясь при этом огромным материальным изобилием.

มนุษย์รู้สึกถึงความปรารถนาอยู่ตลอดเวลา และความปรารถนานั้นเป็นแรงผลักดันที่ขับเคลื่อนโลก เพราะการมีชีวิตอยู่คือการแสวงหาบางสิ่งอย่างต่อเนื่อง เช่น อาหาร วัตถุ ชื่อเสียง ความสุข และความปรารถนาจะค้ำจุนพฤติกรรมของมนุษย์ด้วยรางวัลที่เหมาะสม ด้วยเหตุนี้ มนุษย์จึงไล่ตามความปรารถนา ดังนั้นพวกเขาจึงสามารถเป็นเจ้าแห่งสรรพสิ่งได้ด้วยการพิชิตธรรมชาติและอารยธรรมที่เจริญรุ่งเรืองอยู่ตลอดเวลาโดยไม่นิ่งเฉยต่อความเป็นจริง อาจกล่าวได้ว่าความมั่งคั่งทางวัตถุทั้งหมดที่มนุษย์ได้รับในปัจจุบันนี้มาจากความปรารถนา
อย่างไรก็ตาม เมื่อบุคคลมีประสบการณ์ในการได้รับความสุขจากวัตถุแล้ว ความปรารถนาย่อมต้องการความสุขที่มากขึ้น นอกจากนี้ มนุษย์มักต้องทนทุกข์ทรมานจากความขาดแคลนและความไม่พอใจโดยการเปรียบเทียบรางวัลแห่งความปรารถนากับความปรารถนาของผู้อื่น ถ้าเขาสุ่มสี่สุ่มห้าติดตามความปรารถนาของเขาด้วยวิธีนี้ เขาก็สามารถมีชีวิตที่ขาดแคลนฝ่ายวิญญาณในขณะที่เพลิดเพลินกับความอุดมสมบูรณ์ทางวัตถุมหาศาล

g_text_translate.pt:
Os seres humanos sentem desejo constantemente, e esse desejo é a força motriz que move o mundo. Isso ocorre porque viver é buscar constantemente algo como comida, material, fama e felicidade, e o desejo sustenta o comportamento humano por meio de recompensas apropriadas. Como tal, os seres humanos perseguem desejos, por isso foram capazes de se tornarem senhores de todas as coisas, conquistando constantemente a natureza e florescendo a civilização, sem serem complacentes com a realidade. Pode-se dizer que toda a riqueza material de que os humanos desfrutam hoje vem do desejo.
Porém, uma vez que a pessoa tem a experiência de obter prazer de um objeto, o desejo exige maior prazer. Além disso, os humanos muitas vezes sofrem de relativa privação e insatisfação ao comparar as recompensas do desejo com as dos outros. Se ele perseguir cegamente seus desejos dessa maneira, poderá levar uma vida espiritualmente privada e, ao mesmo tempo, desfrutar de uma tremenda abundância material.

g_text_translate.hi:
मनुष्य लगातार इच्छा महसूस कर रहा है, और वह इच्छा ही वह प्रेरक शक्ति है जो दुनिया को चलाती है। ऐसा इसलिए है क्योंकि जीने का मतलब लगातार भोजन, सामग्री, प्रसिद्धि और खुशी जैसी किसी चीज़ का पीछा करना है, और इच्छा उचित पुरस्कारों के माध्यम से मानव व्यवहार को बनाए रखती है। वैसे तो, मनुष्य इच्छाओं का पीछा करता है, इसलिए वे वास्तविकता से संतुष्ट हुए बिना लगातार प्रकृति पर विजय प्राप्त करके और सभ्यता को विकसित करके सभी चीजों के स्वामी बनने में सक्षम थे। यह कहा जा सकता है कि आज मनुष्य जिस भौतिक समृद्धि का आनंद लेता है वह इच्छा से आती है।
हालाँकि, एक बार जब किसी व्यक्ति को किसी वस्तु से आनंद प्राप्त करने का अनुभव हो जाता है, तो इच्छा अधिक आनंद की मांग करती है। इसके अलावा, इच्छा के प्रतिफल की दूसरों से तुलना करने पर मनुष्य अक्सर सापेक्ष अभाव और असंतोष से पीड़ित होते हैं। यदि वह इस तरह आँख बंद करके अपनी इच्छाओं का पीछा करता है, तो वह जबरदस्त भौतिक प्रचुरता का आनंद लेते हुए आध्यात्मिक रूप से वंचित जीवन जी सकता है।

g_text_translate.tr:
İnsanoğlu sürekli arzu hissediyor ve bu arzu dünyayı hareket ettiren itici güçtür. Bunun nedeni, yaşamanın sürekli olarak yiyecek, malzeme, şöhret ve mutluluk gibi bir şeyin peşinde koşmak olması ve arzunun, uygun ödüller yoluyla insan davranışını sürdürmesidir. Böylelikle insanoğlu arzuların peşinde koşmuş, böylece gerçeklikten memnun kalmadan sürekli olarak doğayı fethederek ve medeniyeti geliştirerek her şeyin efendisi olmayı başarmıştır. Günümüzde insanın sahip olduğu maddi zenginliğin tamamının arzudan kaynaklandığı söylenebilir.
Ancak kişi bir nesneden haz alma deneyimini yaşadıktan sonra arzu daha büyük haz gerektirir. Buna ek olarak, insanlar genellikle arzunun ödüllerini başkalarının ödülleriyle karşılaştırarak göreceli yoksunluk ve tatminsizlikten muzdariptir. Bu şekilde körü körüne arzularının peşinden giderse, maddi açıdan muazzam bir zenginliğin tadını çıkarırken, manevi açıdan yoksun bir hayat yaşayabilir.

2. Chức năng của mong muốn.
3. Phần thưởng của mong muốn
3. Tính hai mặt của mong muốn
--------------------

पैराग्राफ इच्छा के सकारात्मक पक्ष और नकारात्मक पक्ष के बारे में बात करता है, दोनों भाग शब्द से जुड़े हुए हैं<g>"그러나"</g>(लेकिन) जो विपरीत दर्शाता है।

#######

Choose the most appropriate title for this paragraph.
1. Desire and pleasure
2. The function of desire
3. The reward of desire
3. The double-sidedness of desire
--------------------
The paragraph talks about the positive side and the negative side of desire, the two parts are connected by the word <g>"그러나"</g> (but) which shows the opposite.

--------------------
Paragraf arzunun olumlu ve olumsuz yönlerinden bahsediyor, iki kısım şu sözcükle birbirine bağlanıyor:<g>"그러나"</g>(ama) bu da tam tersini gösterir.

물질적인 풍요는 인간의 정신을 궁핍하게 만든다.

general.g_text:
최근 들어 자신들의 노래에 노골적인 가사를 사용하는 가수들이 늘고 있다. 이는 그만큼 대중의 이목을 끌고 싶은 욕구가 크다는 것을 뜻한다. 불황에 빠진 가요계에서 평범한 노래로는 성공할 수 없다고 생각한 가수들이 직설 화법이란 승부수를 꺼내 든 것이다. 많은 음악 장르들이 태동 당시 공격적이고 직접적인 노랫말을 사용했었다는 점을 고려하면 이를 무조건 비난만 할 일도 아닐 듯싶다. 
문제는 최근에 유행하는 음악들은 상업적인 성공을 거둔 한두 곡의 노래를 따라 노골적인 가사를 반복하는 경우가 대부분이라는 데 있다. 이것은 음반 시장의 불황 속에서 살아남아야 하는 가수들에게는 어쩔 수 없는 선택인지도 모른다. 그러나 이런 선택이 계속될수록 대중들은 곧 자극적인 가사에 싫증을 낼 것이고 가요계를 외면하게 될 것이다. 그러면 상업적으로 성공하는 극소수의 가수들을 제외한 가요계 전체는 (        ) 될 것이다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Gần đây ngày càng có nhiều ca sĩ sử dụng lời nhạc mạnh bạo trong bài hát của mình. Điều này nghĩa là họ có tham vọng lôi kéo sự chú ý của công chúng rất lớn.  Các ca sĩ này nghĩ rằng không thể thành công trong giới âm nhạc đang rơi vào khủng hoảng bằng một bài hát bình thường được, nên họ đã sử dụng đòn quyết định là cách nói mạnh bạo. Nếu ta nghĩ đến việc có nhiều thể loại âm nhạc đã sử dụng lời bài hát gây sốc và trực tiếp vào thời kì chuyển mình thì đây cũng không phải là điều đáng bị chỉ trích.
Vấn đề ở đây là đa số những bài hát thịnh hành dạo này đều lặp lại lời bài hát mạnh bạo theo một, hai bài hát đã đạt được thành công về mặt thương mại. Cũng không biết chừng đây là lựa chọn không thể tránh được đối với những ca sĩ phải tồn tại trong cuộc khủng hoảng của thị trường đĩa nhạc. Tuy nhiên nếu cứ tiếp tục lựa chọn như thế này, công chúng  sẽ sớm chán ghét lời bài hát có tính kích động và quay lưng với giới âm nhạc. Nếu như vậy, ngoài một số cực ít ca sĩ thành công về mặt thương mại, toàn bộ giới âm nhạc sẽ  (        ).
g_text_translate.en:
Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.fr:
Récemment, de plus en plus de chanteurs utilisent des paroles explicites dans leurs chansons. Cela signifie qu'il y a un grand désir d'attirer l'attention du public. Les chanteurs qui pensaient que les chansons ordinaires ne pouvaient pas réussir dans l'industrie de la musique, qui était en récession, ont évoqué le jeu du discours direct. Considérant que de nombreux genres musicaux utilisaient des paroles agressives et directes au moment de leur création, il semble peu probable qu'il doive être critiqué sans condition.
Le problème est que la plupart des dernières musiques populaires répètent des paroles explicites avec une ou deux chansons qui ont connu un succès commercial. Cela peut être un choix incontournable pour les chanteurs qui doivent survivre à la récession du marché du disque. Cependant, à mesure que ce choix perdure, le public va vite se lasser des textes provocateurs et se détourner de l'industrie musicale. Ensuite, toute l'industrie musicale, à l'exception de quelques chanteurs à succès commercial, plongerait dans une dépression plus profonde.

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.es:
Recientemente, más y más cantantes están usando letras explícitas en sus canciones. Esto significa que existe un gran deseo de atraer la atención del público. Los cantantes que pensaban que las canciones ordinarias no podían tener éxito en la industria de la música, que estaba en recesión, sacaron a relucir el juego del discurso directo. Teniendo en cuenta que muchos géneros musicales utilizaron letras agresivas y directas en el momento de su creación, parece poco probable que deba criticarse incondicionalmente.
El problema es que la mayoría de la música popular actual repite letras explícitas junto con una o dos canciones que han logrado un éxito comercial. Esta puede ser una elección ineludible para los cantantes que deben sobrevivir a la recesión en el mercado discográfico. Sin embargo, a medida que continúe esta elección, el público pronto se cansará de las letras provocativas y se alejará de la industria de la música. Entonces toda la industria de la música, con la excepción de unos pocos cantantes comercialmente exitosos, se hundiría en una depresión más profunda.

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.id:
Belakangan ini, semakin banyak penyanyi yang menggunakan lirik eksplisit dalam lagu mereka. Artinya ada keinginan besar untuk menarik perhatian publik. Penyanyi yang mengira lagu biasa tidak bisa sukses di industri musik yang sedang resesi, mengangkat permainan direct speech. Mengingat bahwa banyak genre musik menggunakan lirik agresif dan langsung pada saat awal mereka, tampaknya tidak mungkin untuk dikritik tanpa syarat.
Masalahnya adalah sebagian besar musik populer terbaru mengulangi lirik eksplisit bersama dengan satu atau dua lagu yang telah mencapai kesuksesan komersial. Ini mungkin pilihan yang tak terhindarkan bagi penyanyi yang harus bertahan dari resesi di pasar rekaman. Namun, karena pilihan ini berlanjut, publik akan segera bosan dengan lirik yang provokatif dan berpaling dari industri musik. Kemudian seluruh industri musik, kecuali beberapa penyanyi yang sukses secara komersial, akan jatuh ke dalam depresi yang lebih dalam.

#######

g_text_translate.ja:
最近、曲に露骨な歌詞を使用する歌手が増えています。これは、大衆の注目を集めたいという強い願望があることを意味します。不況に陥った音楽業界で普通の歌は成功しないと考えた歌手たちは、直接演説のゲームを持ち出しました。多くの音楽ジャンルが開始時に攻撃的で直接的な歌詞を使用していたことを考えると、無条件に批判されるべきではないようです.
問題は、最新のポピュラー音楽のほとんどが、商業的成功を収めた 1 つか 2 つの曲と一緒に露骨な歌詞を繰り返していることです。これは、レコード市場の不況を乗り切らなければならない歌手にとって、やむを得ない選択かもしれません。しかし、この選択が続くと、大衆はすぐに挑発的な歌詞に飽きて、音楽業界から遠ざかるでしょう。その後、商業的に成功した少数の歌手を除いて、音楽業界全体がより深刻な不況に陥ることになります。

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.de:
In letzter Zeit verwenden immer mehr Sänger explizite Texte in ihren Songs. Das bedeutet, dass der Wunsch nach Aufmerksamkeit in der Öffentlichkeit groß ist. Sänger, die dachten, dass gewöhnliche Lieder in der Musikindustrie, die sich in einer Rezession befand, keinen Erfolg haben könnten, brachten das Spiel der direkten Rede zur Sprache. Wenn man bedenkt, dass viele Musikgenres zu ihrer Entstehungszeit aggressive und direkte Texte verwendeten, erscheint es unwahrscheinlich, dass sie vorbehaltlos kritisiert werden sollten.
Das Problem ist, dass die meisten der neuesten populären Musikstücke explizite Texte zusammen mit ein oder zwei Songs wiederholen, die kommerziellen Erfolg erzielt haben. Dies kann eine unvermeidliche Wahl für Sänger sein, die die Rezession auf dem Plattenmarkt überleben müssen. Wenn diese Wahl jedoch weitergeht, wird das Publikum die provokanten Texte bald satt haben und sich von der Musikindustrie abwenden. Dann würde die gesamte Musikindustrie, mit Ausnahme einiger weniger kommerziell erfolgreicher Sänger, in eine tiefere Depression stürzen.

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
最近，越来越多的歌手在歌曲中使用露骨的歌词。这意味着人们非常渴望吸引公众的注意力。那些认为普通歌曲无法在陷入衰退的音乐界取得成功的歌手们提出了直言不讳的游戏。考虑到许多音乐流派在其诞生之初就使用了攻击性和直接的歌词，似乎不太可能无条件地批评它。
问题在于，大多数最新流行音乐都重复了露骨的歌词以及一两首取得商业成功的歌曲。对于必须在唱片市场的衰退中生存下来的歌手来说，这可能是一个不可避免的选择。然而，随着这种选择的继续，公众很快就会厌倦煽动性的歌词并远离音乐行业。那么整个音乐产业，除了少数商业上成功的歌手外，都会陷入更深的萧条。

However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
最近，越來越多的歌手在歌曲中使用露骨的歌詞。這意味著人們非常渴望吸引公眾的注意力。那些認為普通歌曲無法在陷入衰退的音樂界取得成功的歌手們提出了直言不諱的遊戲。考慮到許多音樂流派在其誕生之初就使用了攻擊性和直接的歌詞，似乎不太可能無條件地批評它。
問題在於，大多數最新流行音樂都重複了露骨的歌詞以及一兩首取得商業成功的歌曲。對於必須在唱片市場的衰退中生存下來的歌手來說，這可能是一個不可避免的選擇。然而，隨著這種選擇的繼續，公眾很快就會厭倦煽動性的歌詞並遠離音樂行業。那麼整個音樂產業，除了少數商業上成功的歌手外，都會陷入更深的蕭條。

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.
g_text_translate.it:
Di recente, sempre più cantanti usano testi espliciti nelle loro canzoni. Ciò significa che c'è un grande desiderio di attirare l'attenzione del pubblico. I cantanti che pensavano che le canzoni ordinarie non potessero avere successo nell'industria musicale, che era in recessione, tirarono fuori il gioco del discorso diretto. Considerando che molti generi musicali usavano testi aggressivi e diretti al momento del loro inizio, sembra improbabile che debba essere criticato incondizionatamente.
Il problema è che la maggior parte dell'ultima musica popolare ripete testi espliciti insieme a una o due canzoni che hanno raggiunto il successo commerciale. Questa può essere una scelta obbligata per i cantanti che devono sopravvivere alla recessione del mercato discografico. Tuttavia, mentre questa scelta continua, il pubblico si stancherà presto dei testi provocatori e si allontanerà dall'industria musicale. Quindi l'intera industria musicale, con l'eccezione di pochi cantanti di successo commerciale, precipiterebbe in una depressione più profonda.

g_text_translate.ru:
В последнее время все больше певцов используют в своих песнях откровенные тексты. Это означает, что есть большое желание привлечь внимание общественности. Певцы, которые считали, что обычные песни не могут иметь успеха в музыкальной индустрии, переживающей спад, заговорили об игре прямой речи. Учитывая, что многие музыкальные жанры на момент своего зарождения использовали агрессивные и прямые тексты, маловероятно, чтобы их можно было безоговорочно критиковать.
Проблема в том, что большая часть последней популярной музыки повторяет откровенные тексты вместе с одной или двумя песнями, добившимися коммерческого успеха. Это может быть неизбежным выбором для певцов, которым предстоит пережить рецессию на рынке звукозаписи. Однако, поскольку этот выбор продолжится, публика вскоре устанет от провокационной лирики и отвернется от музыкальной индустрии. Тогда вся музыкальная индустрия, за исключением нескольких коммерчески успешных певцов, погрузится в более глубокую депрессию.

g_text_translate.pt:
Recentemente, mais e mais cantores estão usando letras explícitas em suas músicas. Isso significa que há um grande desejo de atrair a atenção do público. Cantores que pensavam que canções comuns não poderiam fazer sucesso na indústria musical, que estava em recessão, trouxeram à tona o jogo do discurso direto. Considerando que muitos gêneros musicais utilizavam letras agressivas e diretas na época de seu início, parece improvável que devam ser criticados incondicionalmente.
O problema é que a maior parte da música popular mais recente repete letras explícitas junto com uma ou duas canções que alcançaram sucesso comercial. Esta pode ser uma escolha inevitável para os cantores que têm de sobreviver à recessão no mercado discográfico. No entanto, à medida que esta escolha continua, o público rapidamente se cansará das letras provocativas e se afastará da indústria musical. Então toda a indústria musical, com exceção de alguns cantores de sucesso comercial, mergulharia numa depressão mais profunda.

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. g_text_translate.hi:
हाल ही में, अधिक से अधिक गायक अपने गीतों में स्पष्ट बोल का उपयोग कर रहे हैं। इसका मतलब है कि जनता का ध्यान आकर्षित करने की बहुत इच्छा है. जिन गायकों ने सोचा था कि मंदी के दौर से गुजर रहे संगीत उद्योग में साधारण गाने सफल नहीं हो सकते, उन्होंने प्रत्यक्ष भाषण का खेल शुरू किया। यह देखते हुए कि कई संगीत शैलियों ने अपनी शुरुआत के समय आक्रामक और सीधे गीतों का इस्तेमाल किया था, यह असंभव लगता है कि इसकी बिना शर्त आलोचना की जानी चाहिए।
समस्या यह है कि अधिकांश नवीनतम लोकप्रिय संगीत एक या दो गानों के साथ-साथ स्पष्ट गीतों को दोहराते हैं जिन्होंने व्यावसायिक सफलता हासिल की है। यह उन गायकों के लिए एक अपरिहार्य विकल्प हो सकता है जिन्हें रिकॉर्ड बाज़ार में मंदी से बचना होगा। हालाँकि, जैसे-जैसे यह विकल्प जारी रहेगा, जनता जल्द ही उत्तेजक गीतों से थक जाएगी और संगीत उद्योग से दूर हो जाएगी। तब कुछ व्यावसायिक रूप से सफल गायकों को छोड़कर पूरा संगीत उद्योग गहरे अवसाद में डूब जाएगा।

g_text_translate.tr:
Son zamanlarda giderek daha fazla şarkıcı şarkılarında müstehcen sözler kullanıyor. Bu da demek oluyor ki kamuoyunun dikkatini çekmek konusunda büyük bir istek var. Durgunluk içinde olan müzik sektöründe sıradan şarkıların başarılı olamayacağını düşünen şarkıcılar, doğrudan konuşma oyununu gündeme getirdi. Pek çok müzik türünün ortaya çıktığı dönemde agresif ve doğrudan sözler kullandığı göz önüne alındığında, bunun kayıtsız şartsız eleştirilmesi pek mümkün görünmüyor.
Sorun, en yeni popüler müziklerin çoğunun, ticari başarı elde etmiş bir veya iki şarkının yanı sıra açık sözlü sözleri de tekrarlamasıdır. Bu, plak piyasasındaki durgunluğu atlatmak zorunda olan şarkıcılar için kaçınılmaz bir seçim olabilir. Ancak bu tercih devam ettikçe halk kısa sürede kışkırtıcı sözlerden sıkılacak ve müzik endüstrisinden uzaklaşacaktır. O zaman ticari açıdan başarılı birkaç şarkıcı dışında tüm müzik endüstrisi daha derin bir depresyona girecekti.

#######

Recently, more and more singers are using explicit lyrics in their songs. This means that there is a great desire to attract the public's attention. Singers who thought that ordinary songs could not be successful in the music industry, which was in a recession, brought up the game of direct speech. Considering that many music genres used aggressive and direct lyrics at the time of their inception, it seems unlikely that it should be criticized unconditionally.
The problem is that most of the latest popular music repeats explicit lyrics along with one or two songs that have achieved commercial success. This may be an unavoidable choice for singers who must survive the recession in the record market. However, as this choice continues, the public will soon get tired of the provocative lyrics and turn away from the music industry. Then the entire music industry, with the exception of a few commercially successful singers, would plunge into a deeper depression.

explain.vi:
Chọn câu phù hợp làm tựa đề cho bài viết.
1. Bệnh nan y của thị trường đĩa nhạc, tranh luận về đạo nhái
2. Thị trường đĩa nhạc đứng trước nguy hiểm, không có cách giải quyết
3. Lời bài hát mạnh bạo, đây là lựa chọn không thể tránh?
4. Giới âm nhạc tung đòn quyết định, sẽ thất bại hay thành công?
--------------------
어쩔 수 없는 선택: Lựa chọn không thể tránh

Bài viết nói về vấn đề lời bài hát trong lúc thị trường âm nhạc gặp khủng hoảng và hậu quả của nó. Tựa đề 3 là đúng với nội dung nhất.
explain.en:
Choose the most appropriate title for this paragraph.
1. Discussing plagiarism, a chronic disease in the music market
2. The music market in crisis, there is no solution
3. Explicit lyrics, is it an inevitable choice?
4. Will the music industry succeed or fail?
--------------------
<g>어쩔 수 없는 선택:</g> Inevitable choice

The paragraph talks about the problem of lyrics during the crisis of the music market and its consequences. 3 is the most suitable title.

general.g_text:
현재 대학 연구의 수요자는 기업과 중앙 정부, 그리고 학계로 제한되어 있으며 연구 주제도 지역 사회의 절실한 현안과는 동떨어진 경우가 많았다. 이와 같이 산학 협동 분야나 순수 학문 분야에 치우친 기존의 대학 연구에 대한 대안적 모델로서 최근 ‘과학 상점’ 제도가 큰 관심을 끌고 있다. 
‘과학 상점’ 제도란 지역 사회 집단, 지방 정부, 일반 시민 등이 제기하는 기술적.사회적 문제들에 대해 교수와 학생들이 연구와 조언을 해 주는 것이다. 여기에 참여하는 교수와 학생은 (        ) 이 일을 수행하기 때문에 추가적인 시간과 비용이 들지 않는다. 대학 당국 역시 기존의 예산과 지방 정부의 일부 보조로 그 연구비를 지원하기 때문에 추가로 예산을 들일 필요는 없다. 더불어 이 제도를 통해 교수와 학생은 사회문제의 해결에도 기여한다는 보람을 얻게 되고, 대학과 지역 사회는 긴밀하게 연결되어 서로 도움을 줄 수 있게 된다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Hiện nay, đối tượng sử dụng các nghiên cứu ở trường đại học giới hạn trong các doanh nghiệp, chính phủ trung ương và giới học thuật, nhiều trường hợp đề tài nghiên cứu xa rời với các vấn đề thực tế còn tồn đọng của xã hội địa phương. Gần đây, hệ thống "cửa hàng khoa học" đang thu hút sự quan tâm lớn, đây là hình mẫu dự thảo về nghiên cứu ở trường đại học, vốn đang nghiêng về lĩnh vực kết hợp giáo dục và doanh nghiệp như thế này hay lĩnh vực học thuật thuần túy.
Hệ thống "cửa hàng khoa học" là chế độ mà giáo sư và các học sinh nghiên cứu và cho lời khuyên về những vấn đề công nghệ, xã hội mà tổ chức xã hội địa phương, chính quyền địa phương, người dân bình thường đưa ra. Bởi vì giáo sư và sinh viên tham gia dự án thực hiện việc này  (        ) nên không tốn thêm thời gian và chi phí. Vì chi phí nghiên cứu được tài trợ bằng ngân sách vốn có của cơ quan nhà nước phụ trách trường đại học và sự hỗ trợ một phần của chính quyền địa phương nên không cần thêm ngân sách. Thêm vào đó, thông qua hệ thống này, giáo sư và sinh viên cảm thấy mình có ích vì cũng đã tham gia giải quyết vấn đề xã hội, trường đại học và xã hội địa phương được liên kết chặt chẽ và có ích cho nhau.
g_text_translate.en:
Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.
The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. The participating professors and students do this as part of their research, so there is no additional time or cost involved. There is no need for additional budget as the university authorities also support the research funds with the existing budget and some subsidies from the local government. In addition, through this system, professors and students are rewarded for contributing to the resolution of social problems, and universities and local communities are closely connected and can help each other.
g_text_translate.fr:
Actuellement, les consommateurs de la recherche universitaire sont limités aux entreprises, au gouvernement central et aux universités, et les sujets de recherche sont souvent loin des problèmes urgents de la communauté locale. En tant que modèle alternatif à la recherche universitaire existante qui est orientée vers la collaboration industrie-université ou vers des domaines académiques purs, le système de « magasin de sciences » a récemment attiré une grande attention.
Le système « Science store » fournit des recherches et des conseils par des professeurs et des étudiants sur des questions technologiques et sociales soulevées par des groupes communautaires, des gouvernements locaux et des citoyens ordinaires. Les professeurs et étudiants participants le font dans le cadre de leur recherche, il n'y a donc pas de temps ni de coût supplémentaire. Il n'y a pas besoin de budget supplémentaire car les autorités universitaires soutiennent également les fonds de recherche avec le budget existant et certaines subventions du gouvernement local. De plus, grâce à ce système, les professeurs et les étudiants sont récompensés pour leur contribution à la résolution des problèmes sociaux, et les universités et les communautés locales sont étroitement liées et peuvent s'entraider.

#######

Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.
The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. g_text_translate.es:
Actualmente, los consumidores de la investigación universitaria se limitan a las corporaciones, el gobierno central y la academia, y los temas de investigación a menudo están lejos de los problemas urgentes de la comunidad local. Como un modelo alternativo a la investigación universitaria existente que está sesgada hacia la colaboración entre la industria y la universidad o los campos académicos puros, el sistema de "tienda científica" ha atraído una gran atención recientemente.
El sistema 'Science store' proporciona investigación y asesoramiento de profesores y estudiantes sobre cuestiones tecnológicas y sociales planteadas por grupos comunitarios, gobiernos locales y ciudadanos comunes. Los profesores y estudiantes participantes hacen esto como parte de su investigación, por lo que no hay tiempo ni costo adicional involucrado. No hay necesidad de presupuesto adicional ya que las autoridades universitarias también apoyan los fondos de investigación con el presupuesto existente y algunos subsidios del gobierno local. Además, a través de este sistema, se premia a profesores y estudiantes por contribuir a la resolución de problemas sociales, y las universidades y las comunidades locales están estrechamente conectadas y pueden ayudarse mutuamente.

#######

g_text_translate.id:
Saat ini konsumen penelitian perguruan tinggi terbatas pada korporasi, pemerintah pusat, dan akademisi, dan topik penelitian seringkali jauh dari isu-isu mendesak masyarakat setempat. Sebagai model alternatif untuk penelitian universitas yang ada yang bias terhadap kolaborasi industri-universitas atau bidang akademik murni, sistem 'Science store' baru-baru ini menarik perhatian besar.
Sistem 'Science store' menyediakan penelitian dan saran oleh para profesor dan mahasiswa tentang masalah teknologi dan sosial yang diangkat oleh kelompok masyarakat, pemerintah daerah, dan warga biasa. Para profesor dan mahasiswa yang berpartisipasi melakukan ini sebagai bagian dari penelitian mereka, sehingga tidak ada waktu atau biaya tambahan yang terlibat. Tidak perlu tambahan anggaran karena pihak universitas juga mendukung dana penelitian dengan anggaran yang ada dan beberapa subsidi dari pemerintah daerah. Selain itu, melalui sistem ini, dosen dan mahasiswa dihargai karena berkontribusi dalam penyelesaian masalah sosial, dan universitas serta komunitas lokal terhubung erat dan dapat saling membantu.

g_text_translate.ja:
現在、大学の研究の消費者は企業、政府、学界に限定されており、研究テーマは地域社会の喫緊の課題とはかけ離れていることが多い。産学連携や純粋な学問分野に偏った既存の大学研究に代わるモデルとして、最近注目を集めているのが「サイエンスストア」システムです。
「サイエンス ストア」システムは、コミュニティ グループ、地方自治体、および一般市民によって提起された技術的および社会的問題について、教授および学生による調査およびアドバイスを提供します。参加する教授と学生はこれを研究の一環として行うため、追加の時間や費用はかかりません。大学当局も既存の予算と地方自治体からの補助金で研究費を支援するため、追加の予算は必要ありません。また、この制度を通じて、社会問題の解決に貢献した教授や学生が報われ、大学と地域社会が密接につながり、助け合うことができます。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Gegenwärtig sind die Konsumenten von universitärer Forschung auf Unternehmen, die Zentralregierung und die Wissenschaft beschränkt, und die Forschungsthemen sind oft weit entfernt von dringenden Problemen der lokalen Gemeinschaft. Als Alternativmodell zur bestehenden universitären Forschung, die auf die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Industrie und Universität oder auf rein akademische Bereiche ausgerichtet ist, hat das System des „Wissenschaftsladens“ in letzter Zeit große Aufmerksamkeit erregt.
Das „Science Store“-System bietet Forschung und Beratung durch Professoren und Studenten zu technologischen und sozialen Fragen, die von Gemeindegruppen, Kommunalverwaltungen und normalen Bürgern aufgeworfen werden. Die beteiligten Professoren und Studenten tun dies im Rahmen ihrer Forschung, sodass kein zusätzlicher Zeit- und Kostenaufwand entsteht. Es ist kein zusätzliches Budget erforderlich, da die Universitätsbehörden die Forschungsgelder auch mit dem bestehenden Budget und einigen Zuschüssen der lokalen Regierung unterstützen. Darüber hinaus werden durch dieses System Professoren und Studenten für ihren Beitrag zur Lösung sozialer Probleme belohnt, und Universitäten und lokale Gemeinschaften sind eng miteinander verbunden und können sich gegenseitig helfen.

#######

Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.
The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. The participating professors and students do this as part of their research, so there is no additional time or cost involved. There is no need for additional budget as the university authorities also support the research funds with the existing budget and some subsidies from the local government. In addition, through this system, professors and students are rewarded for contributing to the resolution of social problems, and universities and local communities are closely connected and can help each other.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
目前，大学研究的消费者仅限于企业、中央政府和学术界，研究课题往往远离当地社区的紧迫问题。作为现有大学研究偏向产学合作或纯学术领域的替代模式，“科学商店”系统近来备受关注。
“科学商店”系统提供教授和学生对社区团体、地方政府和普通公民提出的技术和社会问题的研究和建议。参与的教授和学生将此作为他们研究的一部分，因此不涉及额外的时间或成本。不需要额外的预算，因为大学当局也用现有预算和当地政府的一些补贴来支持研究资金。此外，通过该制度，教授和学生因对解决社会问题的贡献而获得奖励，大学和当地社区紧密相连，可以互相帮助。

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
目前，大學研究的消費者僅限於企業、中央政府和學術界，研究課題往往遠離當地社區的緊迫問題。作為現有大學研究偏向產學合作或純學術領域的替代模式，“科學商店”系統近來備受關注。
“科學商店”系統提供教授和學生對社區團體、地方政府和普通公民提出的技術和社會問題的研究和建議。參與的教授和學生將此作為他們研究的一部分，因此不涉及額外的時間或成本。不需要額外的預算，因為大學當局也用現有預算和當地政府的一些補貼來支持研究資金。此外，通過該制度，教授和學生因對解決社會問題的貢獻而獲得獎勵，大學和當地社區緊密相連，可以互相幫助。

g_text_translate.it:
Attualmente, i consumatori della ricerca universitaria sono limitati alle aziende, al governo centrale e al mondo accademico, e gli argomenti di ricerca sono spesso lontani dalle questioni urgenti della comunità locale. Come modello alternativo alla ricerca universitaria esistente che è orientata verso la collaborazione industria-università o campi puramente accademici, il sistema "Science store" ha recentemente attirato grande attenzione.
Il sistema "Science store" fornisce ricerche e consulenza da parte di professori e studenti su questioni tecnologiche e sociali sollevate da gruppi di comunità, governi locali e cittadini comuni. I professori e gli studenti partecipanti lo fanno come parte della loro ricerca, quindi non ci sono tempi o costi aggiuntivi. Non è necessario un budget aggiuntivo in quanto le autorità universitarie sostengono anche i fondi per la ricerca con il budget esistente e alcuni sussidi del governo locale. Inoltre, attraverso questo sistema, professori e studenti vengono premiati per aver contribuito alla risoluzione dei problemi sociali, e le università e le comunità locali sono strettamente collegate e possono aiutarsi a vicenda.

The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. g_text_translate.ru:
В настоящее время потребители университетских исследований ограничены корпорациями, центральным правительством и научными кругами, а темы исследований зачастую далеки от актуальных проблем местного сообщества. В качестве альтернативной модели существующим университетским исследованиям, ориентированной на сотрудничество между промышленностью и университетами или чисто академические области, система «Научного магазина» в последнее время привлекла большое внимание.
Система «Научный магазин» предоставляет исследования и консультации профессоров и студентов по технологическим и социальным вопросам, поднимаемым общественными группами, местными органами власти и обычными гражданами. Участвующие профессора и студенты делают это в рамках своих исследований, поэтому не требуется дополнительного времени или затрат. Нет необходимости в дополнительном бюджете, поскольку руководство университета также поддерживает исследовательские фонды из существующего бюджета и некоторых субсидий местного правительства. Кроме того, посредством этой системы преподаватели и студенты вознаграждаются за вклад в решение социальных проблем, а университеты и местные сообщества тесно связаны и могут помогать друг другу.

g_text_translate.th:
ในปัจจุบัน ผู้บริโภคการวิจัยในมหาวิทยาลัยจำกัดอยู่เพียงองค์กร รัฐบาลกลาง และสถาบันการศึกษา และหัวข้อการวิจัยมักจะห่างไกลจากประเด็นเร่งด่วนของชุมชนท้องถิ่น ในฐานะทางเลือกหนึ่งของการวิจัยในมหาวิทยาลัยที่มีอยู่ซึ่งมีอคติต่อความร่วมมือระหว่างอุตสาหกรรมกับมหาวิทยาลัยหรือสาขาวิชาการ ระบบ 'ร้านวิทยาศาสตร์' ได้รับความสนใจอย่างมากเมื่อเร็ว ๆ นี้
ระบบ 'ร้านวิทยาศาสตร์' ให้บริการการวิจัยและคำแนะนำโดยอาจารย์และนักศึกษาเกี่ยวกับประเด็นทางเทคโนโลยีและสังคมที่ถูกหยิบยกโดยกลุ่มชุมชน รัฐบาลท้องถิ่น และประชาชนทั่วไป อาจารย์และนักศึกษาที่เข้าร่วมโครงการเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของการวิจัย ดังนั้นจึงไม่มีเวลาหรือค่าใช้จ่ายเพิ่มเติม ไม่จำเป็นต้องมีงบประมาณเพิ่มเติม เนื่องจากหน่วยงานของมหาวิทยาลัยยังสนับสนุนทุนวิจัยด้วยงบประมาณที่มีอยู่และเงินอุดหนุนบางส่วนจากรัฐบาลท้องถิ่น นอกจากนี้ ด้วยระบบนี้ อาจารย์และนักศึกษาจะได้รับรางวัลจากการมีส่วนร่วมในการแก้ไขปัญหาสังคม และมหาวิทยาลัยและชุมชนท้องถิ่นก็เชื่อมโยงกันอย่างใกล้ชิดและสามารถช่วยเหลือซึ่งกันและกันได้

#######

Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.
The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. The participating professors and students do this as part of their research, so there is no additional time or cost involved. There is no need for additional budget as the university authorities also support the research funds with the existing budget and some subsidies from the local government. In addition, through this system, professors and students are rewarded for contributing to the resolution of social problems, and universities and local communities are closely connected and can help each other.
g_text_translate.pt:
Atualmente, os consumidores da investigação universitária estão limitados às empresas, ao governo central e à academia, e os tópicos de investigação estão muitas vezes longe de questões urgentes da comunidade local. Como modelo alternativo à investigação universitária existente, que é tendenciosa para a colaboração entre a indústria e a universidade ou para campos académicos puros, o sistema de “loja de ciência” atraiu recentemente grande atenção.
O sistema ‘Loja de Ciências’ fornece pesquisas e aconselhamento por parte de professores e estudantes sobre questões tecnológicas e sociais levantadas por grupos comunitários, governos locais e cidadãos comuns. Os professores e alunos participantes fazem isso como parte de suas pesquisas, portanto não há tempo ou custo adicional envolvido. Não há necessidade de orçamento adicional, uma vez que as autoridades universitárias também apoiam os fundos de investigação com o orçamento existente e alguns subsídios do governo local. Além disso, através deste sistema, professores e estudantes são recompensados ​​por contribuírem para a resolução de problemas sociais, e as universidades e as comunidades locais estão intimamente ligadas e podem ajudar-se mutuamente.

#######

Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.
The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. The participating professors and students do this as part of their research, so there is no additional time or cost involved. There is no need for additional budget as the university authorities also support the research funds with the existing budget and some subsidies from the local government. In addition, through this system, professors and students are rewarded for contributing to the resolution of social problems, and universities and local communities are closely connected and can help each other.
g_text_translate.hi:
वर्तमान में, विश्वविद्यालय अनुसंधान के उपभोक्ता निगमों, केंद्र सरकार और शिक्षाविदों तक ही सीमित हैं, और अनुसंधान विषय अक्सर स्थानीय समुदाय के जरूरी मुद्दों से दूर होते हैं। मौजूदा विश्वविद्यालय अनुसंधान के वैकल्पिक मॉडल के रूप में, जो उद्योग-विश्वविद्यालय सहयोग या शुद्ध शैक्षणिक क्षेत्रों के प्रति पक्षपाती है, 'विज्ञान भंडार' प्रणाली ने हाल ही में बहुत ध्यान आकर्षित किया है।
'साइंस स्टोर' प्रणाली सामुदायिक समूहों, स्थानीय सरकारों और आम नागरिकों द्वारा उठाए गए तकनीकी और सामाजिक मुद्दों पर प्रोफेसरों और छात्रों द्वारा अनुसंधान और सलाह प्रदान करती है। भाग लेने वाले प्रोफेसर और छात्र इसे अपने शोध के हिस्से के रूप में करते हैं, इसलिए इसमें कोई अतिरिक्त समय या लागत शामिल नहीं होती है। अतिरिक्त बजट की कोई आवश्यकता नहीं है क्योंकि विश्वविद्यालय के अधिकारी मौजूदा बजट और स्थानीय सरकार से कुछ सब्सिडी के साथ अनुसंधान निधि का भी समर्थन करते हैं। इसके अलावा, इस प्रणाली के माध्यम से, प्रोफेसरों और छात्रों को सामाजिक समस्याओं के समाधान में योगदान देने के लिए पुरस्कृत किया जाता है, और विश्वविद्यालय और स्थानीय समुदाय निकटता से जुड़े हुए हैं और एक दूसरे की मदद कर सकते हैं।

#######

Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.

g_text_translate.tr:
Şu anda üniversite araştırmalarının tüketicileri şirketler, merkezi hükümet ve akademi ile sınırlıdır ve araştırma konuları genellikle yerel toplumun acil sorunlarından uzaktır. Sanayi-üniversite iş birliğine ya da salt akademik alanlara yönelen mevcut üniversite araştırmalarına alternatif bir model olarak 'Bilim Mağazası' sistemi son dönemde büyük ilgi görüyor.
'Bilim mağazası' sistemi, profesörler ve öğrenciler tarafından topluluk grupları, yerel yönetimler ve sıradan vatandaşlar tarafından gündeme getirilen teknolojik ve sosyal konular hakkında araştırma ve tavsiye sağlar. Katılımcı profesörler ve öğrenciler bunu araştırmalarının bir parçası olarak yaparlar, dolayısıyla ek bir zaman veya maliyet söz konusu değildir. Üniversite yetkilileri de araştırma fonlarını mevcut bütçe ve yerel yönetimden alınan bazı desteklerle desteklediğinden ek bütçeye gerek yoktur. Ayrıca bu sistem aracılığıyla öğretim üyeleri ve öğrenciler toplumsal sorunların çözümüne katkılarından dolayı ödüllendirilmekte, üniversiteler ve yerel topluluklar yakın bağlantı içinde olup birbirlerine yardım edebilmektedir.

#######

Currently, the consumers of university research are limited to corporations, the central government, and academia, and the research topics are often far from urgent issues of the local community. As an alternative model to the existing university research that is biased toward industry-university collaboration or pure academic fields, the ‘Science store’ system has recently attracted great attention.
The ‘Science store’ system provides research and advice by professors and students on technological and social issues raised by community groups, local governments, and ordinary citizens. The participating professors and students do this as part of their research, so there is no additional time or cost involved. There is no need for additional budget as the university authorities also support the research funds with the existing budget and some subsidies from the local government. In addition, through this system, professors and students are rewarded for contributing to the resolution of social problems, and universities and local communities are closely connected and can help each other.
